title: Ström 3-Seat Sofa
description: The Ström sofa embodies pure Scandinavian comfort with its deep cushions and clean-lined silhouette. Crafted with a solid beech frame and wrapped in durable linen blend fabric, it anchors any living room with understated elegance.

metadata.description_zh: 斯特罗姆三人沙发融合北欧纯粹美学与深邃的坐感，简洁的线条与优质山毛榉框架相得益彰。亚麻混纺面料耐用且透气，为家居空间注入低调优雅。
metadata.material_zh: 亚麻混纺面料，实木山毛榉框架

title: Viken Sectional Sofa
description: A generous L-shaped sectional built for Nordic living rooms, the Viken features removable covers and reversible chaise for flexible configuration. Solid oak legs ground the piece with warmth and stability.

metadata.description_zh: 维肯转角沙发专为宽敞的北欧客厅打造，可拆洗布套与可翻转贵妃椅让配置灵活多变。实木橡木脚赋予整体温暖稳固的质感。

title: Lind 2-Seat Loveseat
description: Compact and inviting, the Lind loveseat is ideal for smaller Nordic-inspired spaces. Its tight-back design and tapered legs give a timeless Scandinavian look without sacrificing comfort.

metadata.description_zh: 琳德双人沙发小巧温馨，非常适合北欧风格的小空间。挺括的靠背设计与锥形木腿展现经典北欧美学，兼顾实用与舒适。

title: Fjord Chesterfield Sofa
description: The Fjord reimagines the classic chesterfield with Scandinavian restraint—tufted cushions and rolled arms in full-grain leather on solid oak feet. An heirloom-quality piece that improves with age.

metadata.name_zh: 峡湾切斯特菲尔德沙发
metadata.description_zh: 峡湾沙发以北欧克制美学重新诠释经典切斯特菲尔德风格，全粒面皮革钮扣软包配合实心橡木脚。是一件随时间愈显韵味的传家之作。

title: Elsa Modular Sofa
description: The Elsa modular system lets you design your perfect sofa—from a two-seater to a full sectional. Each module connects seamlessly with hidden magnetic clasps, while the recycled fabric honors Nordic sustainability values.

metadata.description_zh: 艾尔莎模块化沙发让您自由设计理想的沙发组合，从双人位到大型转角沙发，各模块通过隐藏磁扣无缝衔接。再生面料彰显北欧可持续生活理念。

title: Tora Low-Profile Sofa
description: With its low profile and cloud-soft bouclé upholstery, the Tora sofa brings a relaxed contemporary Nordic feel. Solid walnut legs add a touch of warmth to its plush silhouette.

metadata.description_zh: 托拉低背沙发以柔软的布克莱面料和流畅的低矮轮廓，呈现轻松的当代北欧风格。实木胡桃木腿为蓬松的造型增添一丝温暖。

title: Nora Sofa Bed
description: The Nora combines everyday sofa comfort with a fully flat sleeping surface, perfect for Nordic apartments where space is precious. The click-clack mechanism operates silently and smoothly.

metadata.description_zh: 诺拉沙发床将日常沙发与完整卧铺功能合二为一，非常适合寸土寸金的北欧公寓。无声顺滑的折叠机构让转换轻松自如。
metadata.material_zh: 超细纤维面料，钢制机构

title: Sven Curved Sofa
description: Sven's gentle arc creates a natural gathering space inspired by Nordic communal fire-side seating. Premium velvet in muted Nordic tones drapes over polished chrome legs for a sophisticated look.

metadata.description_zh: 斯文弧形沙发的柔和弧度灵感源于北欧围炉而坐的传统，营造自然的聚会空间。哑光北欧色调丝绒搭配抛光镀铬脚，展现精致品位。

title: Grön Garden Sofa
description: The Grön blurs the boundary between indoor and outdoor Nordic living. Weatherproof Sunbrella fabric and sustainably sourced teak frame ensure lasting beauty through all seasons.

metadata.description_zh: 格龙花园沙发模糊了北欧室内外生活的界限，防晒Sunbrella面料与可持续柚木框架确保全季节持久美观。
metadata.material_zh: 户外防晒面料，柚木框架

title: Pax Sleeper Sofa
description: Pax is designed for the modern Nordic home where every piece earns its keep. The innovative pull-out mechanism requires no lifting, and the stain-resistant fabric handles real family life effortlessly.

metadata.description_zh: 帕克斯专为注重实用的现代北欧家庭设计，创新拉出式机构无需抬起，防污面料轻松应对家庭日常。

title: Asa Accent Sofa
description: The Asa's slender arms and organic cotton upholstery reflect the simplicity and honesty of Scandinavian craft traditions. A sofa that breathes with the space rather than dominating it.

metadata.description_zh: 阿莎的细窄扶手与有机棉面料体现斯堪的纳维亚工艺传统的简约与真诚，与空间和谐共生而非独占一方。

title: Boda Corner Sofa
description: Boda's generous corner configuration invites the whole family to relax together in true Nordic hygge style. Chunky oak feet and a textured woven fabric create a grounded, natural aesthetic.

metadata.description_zh: 博达转角沙发宽大的L型设计邀请全家人共享北欧hygge时光，粗犷的橡木脚与编织纹理面料营造自然踏实的美学。

title: Rine Compact Sofa
description: The Rine is designed for apartment living—compact enough for a studio yet comfortable enough for everyday use. Its light birch legs keep the visual weight minimal.

metadata.description_zh: 莱因沙发专为公寓生活设计，适合单间公寓却足够舒适。浅色桦木腿将视觉重量降至最低。

title: Solna Deep-Seat Sofa
description: Solna is built for Nordic evenings spent reading or unwinding—its exceptional seat depth and oversized cushions make it the ultimate relaxation station. Chenille upholstery adds a cosy tactile quality.

metadata.description_zh: 索尔纳专为北欧长夜读书或放松而生，超宽座深与大号靠垫打造终极放松基地。雪尼尔面料带来温柔的触感。

title: Eik Accent Chair
description: The Eik accent chair is a timeless Nordic statement piece. Its curved silhouette and tactile bouclé upholstery pair beautifully with clean Scandinavian interiors, while solid oak legs provide lasting structure.

metadata.description_zh: 艾克装饰椅是经典的北欧装饰单品，圆润的轮廓与触感丰富的布克莱面料与北欧简约室内完美搭配，实心橡木腿确保经久耐用。

title: Lars Rocking Chair
description: Inspired by traditional Nordic rocking chairs, Lars modernises the form with clean angles and premium wool upholstery. The solid beech rockers are shaped to provide a gentle, natural motion.

metadata.description_zh: 拉尔斯摇椅灵感源于北欧传统摇椅，以简洁线条和优质羊毛面料演绎现代诠释。实心山毛榉弧形底座提供轻柔自然的摇摆感。

title: Moa Egg Chair
description: The Moa is a contemporary take on the iconic pod chair—a self-contained cocoon for reading or meditating. Its swivel base rotates 360° for effortless positioning in any Nordic room.

metadata.description_zh: 莫阿是现代版经典茧形椅，为阅读或冥想提供私密包裹空间。可360°旋转的底座让任意朝向调整轻松自如。

title: Dag Lounge Chair
description: The Dag lounge chair takes its cues from mid-century Nordic design—clean forms, honest materials, and comfort that invites you to stay. Top-grain leather and solid walnut legs are built to last generations.

metadata.description_zh: 达格休闲椅承袭中世纪北欧设计基因——干净的造型、真实的材料、令人留恋的舒适感。顶级粒面皮革与实心胡桃木腿历久弥新。

title: Freia Papasan Chair
description: The Freia papasan brings bohemian Nordic warmth to any space. The hand-woven rattan frame and oversized cotton cushion create an irresistibly cozy reading nook.

metadata.description_zh: 弗蕾亚大圆椅为空间带来波西米亚北欧温情，手工编织藤框与超大棉垫打造令人难以抗拒的阅读小角落。

title: Åsa Wingback Chair
description: The Åsa wingback offers a dramatic silhouette rooted in Scandinavian design heritage. Plush velvet upholstery and a high, enveloping back create a private reading sanctuary.

metadata.description_zh: 奥莎翼背椅以北欧设计传统为根，展现戏剧性的轮廓。华丽丝绒与高耸包裹的靠背营造私密的阅读圣地。

title: Bjørn Bear Chair
description: Named for its plush, bear-hug comfort, the Bjørn is upholstered in ultra-soft sherpa fabric that brings tactile warmth to a Nordic room. Chunky pine legs add natural character.

metadata.description_zh: 以熊抱般的包裹感命名，比约恩椅以超柔仿羊绒面料带来触感温暖。粗壮的松木腿增添自然个性。

title: Kira Accent Chair
description: Kira's slim profile and textured tweed upholstery make it a versatile companion in any Scandinavian-inspired interior. The powder-coated metal legs add a subtle industrial edge.

metadata.description_zh: 奇拉椅轻盈的轮廓与纹理粗花呢面料使其成为北欧风室内的百搭之选，哑光金属腿增添微妙的工业感。

title: Unn Swivel Chair
description: The Unn swivel chair pairs Nordic comfort with functional flexibility. Its 360° swivel and modern shape work as well at a desk as in a living room.

metadata.description_zh: 乌恩旋转椅结合北欧舒适与灵活功能，360°旋转设计既适合书桌旁也适合客厅使用。

title: Viggo Armchair + Ottoman
description: The Viggo set pairs a deeply comfortable armchair with a matching ottoman for the ultimate Nordic relaxation experience. Teak legs complement the natural cotton-linen upholstery beautifully.

metadata.description_zh: 维格套装将深度舒适的扶手椅与配套脚凳结合，打造终极北欧放松体验。柚木腿与天然棉麻面料相映成趣。

title: Lone Reading Chair
description: Lone is designed for long reading sessions with ergonomic lumbar support and a gently reclined back angle. The tactile bouclé finish invites you to settle in.

metadata.description_zh: 隆尼阅读椅专为长时间阅读设计，配备人体工学腰部支撑和轻微后倾背角。丰富的布克莱触感让您乐于久坐。

title: Hilde Tub Chair
description: The Hilde tub chair brings soft geometry to Scandinavian interiors. Its rounded shell and plush velvet upholstery are as inviting as a warm embrace.

metadata.description_zh: 希尔德桶形椅将柔和几何感带入北欧室内，圆润的外壳与华丽丝绒如温暖拥抱般令人沉醉。

title: Nils Cantilever Lounge
description: Inspired by Scandinavian functionalism, the Nils cantilever chair balances on a flowing chrome frame that provides natural flex. The slim profile fits beautifully in minimal Nordic spaces.

metadata.description_zh: 灵感源于斯堪的纳维亚功能主义，尼尔斯悬臂椅以流线型镀铬框架提供自然弹性。轻薄的轮廓与极简北欧空间完美融合。

title: Saga Club Chair
description: The Saga club chair is a Nordic take on the classic gentleman's chair—lower and wider, with broader arms and a more relaxed posture. Patinated full-grain leather develops character over decades of use.

metadata.description_zh: 萨迦会所椅是北欧对经典绅士椅的诠释——更低、更宽、更放松的坐姿。全粒面皮革随岁月形成独特包浆。

title: Nora Nursing Chair
description: The Nora nursing chair was designed with care for both parent and child. Its gentle rocking motion, padded armrests, and removable washable cover make night feeds more comfortable.

metadata.description_zh: 诺拉哺乳椅专为父母与婴儿用心设计，轻柔的摇摆、软垫扶手和可拆洗椅套让深夜哺乳更加舒适。

title: Bjørk Coffee Table
description: The Bjørk coffee table showcases the natural grain of solid oak with a matte lacquer finish that protects without obscuring the wood's innate beauty. Its classic proportions suit both modern and traditional Nordic interiors.

metadata.description_zh: 白桦咖啡桌以哑光漆保护实心橡木，在不掩盖木材天然纹理的前提下彰显其内在美。经典的比例既适合现代也适合传统北欧室内。

title: Moss Round Coffee Table
description: The Moss round coffee table pairs a cool Carrara marble top with a warm brass base for a refined Nordic-contemporary statement. The circular form softens angular furniture arrangements.

metadata.description_zh: 莫斯圆形咖啡桌将卡拉拉大理石桌面与黄铜底座结合，展现精致的北欧当代风格。圆形轮廓柔化了棱角分明的家具组合。

title: Frame Nesting Tables
description: The Frame nesting set includes two tables that slide under each other for flexible use. Tempered glass tops and slim powder-coated steel frames bring an airy Nordic-industrial feel.

metadata.description_zh: 框架嵌套桌套装含两张可相互叠放的桌子，使用灵活。钢化玻璃桌面与纤薄的粉末涂层钢框架带来轻盈的北欧工业感。

title: Knut Trunk Coffee Table
description: The Knut blends the practicality of a storage trunk with the function of a coffee table. The linen-lined interior provides hidden storage for throws and magazines, keeping your Nordic living room serene.

metadata.description_zh: 克努特将储物箱的实用与咖啡桌的功能完美融合，亚麻衬里内部储物空间可收纳毯子和杂志，维持北欧客厅的整洁宁静。

title: Tyn Scandinavian Coffee Table
description: Tyn's wide, low profile and natural oiled ash top celebrate the quiet beauty of Scandinavian woodworking. The hairpin legs offer a timeless mid-century touch.

metadata.name_zh: 泰恩斯堪的纳维亚咖啡桌
metadata.description_zh: 泰恩的宽低轮廓与天然油处理的白蜡木桌面颂扬斯堪的纳维亚木工的静谧之美，发夹腿带来永恒的中世纪风情。

title: Vipp Marble Coffee Table
description: The Vipp makes a bold statement with its rare green marble top and polished brass legs. A sculptural centrepiece for the design-conscious Nordic home.

metadata.description_zh: 维普以罕见的绿色大理石桌面和抛光黄铜腿展现大胆宣言，是设计意识强烈的北欧家居的雕塑级主角。

title: Logi Lift-Top Coffee Table
description: The Logi's lift-top mechanism raises the surface to desk height for working from the sofa—a practical solution for the modern Nordic home office hybrid lifestyle.

metadata.description_zh: 洛吉的升降桌面机构可将桌面升至桌面高度，在沙发旁办公，是现代北欧居家办公混合生活方式的实用解决方案。

title: Floro Glass Coffee Table
description: Floro's all-glass construction creates the illusion of floating in space—perfect for smaller Nordic rooms where visual lightness is important. The chrome frame adds a sleek contemporary edge.

metadata.description_zh: 弗洛罗全玻璃结构营造漂浮空间的视觉幻觉，非常适合视觉通透感重要的小型北欧房间，镀铬框架增添时尚的当代感。

title: Alma Walnut Coffee Table
description: The Alma showcases rich walnut grain in a restrained Nordic silhouette. Hand-applied natural oil deepens the wood's dark tones and protects it for decades of daily use.

metadata.description_zh: 阿尔玛以克制的北欧轮廓展现丰富的胡桃木纹理，手工涂抹的天然油深化木材深色调并提供数十年日常使用的保护。

title: Pelle Rattan Coffee Table
description: Pelle brings natural Nordic-boho texture to the living room with hand-woven rattan over a bamboo frame. The open weave creates beautiful light patterns throughout the day.

metadata.description_zh: 佩勒以手工藤编和竹框架为客厅带来自然的北欧波西米亚质感，镂空编织在日光下创造美丽的光影变化。

title: Nord TV Console
description: The Nord TV console combines Scandinavian clean lines with practical hidden storage. Its sliding doors conceal media equipment while the open shelf displays your favourite Nordic objects.

metadata.description_zh: 北方电视柜将北欧简约线条与实用收纳功能完美融合，推拉门遮藏影音设备，开放格展示心爱的北欧装饰品。

title: Linné Media Bench
description: The Linné media bench sits close to the floor in classic Nordic style, with soft-close drawers and cable management ports built in. A calm, functional centrepiece for the modern living room.

metadata.description_zh: 林内媒体边柜以经典北欧风格紧贴地面，内置阻尼关门抽屉和走线孔，是现代客厅平静实用的核心家具。

title: Frigg Floating TV Unit
description: Frigg's wall-mounted design frees up floor space and creates the illusion of a larger room. Made from knotty solid pine with a natural oil finish, it suits rustic Nordic interiors.

metadata.description_zh: 弗丽嘉壁挂设计解放地面空间，营造更大空间的视觉效果。节疤实心松木配天然油处理，适合质朴的北欧室内。

title: Holt Bookcase
description: The Holt bookcase leans naturally against the wall in a space-saving ladder configuration. Five open shelves provide flexible display and storage for books, plants, and Nordic objects.

metadata.description_zh: 霍尔特书柜以节省空间的梯形设计自然倚靠墙壁，五个开放格提供灵活的展示和收纳空间。

title: Berg Tall Bookcase
description: Berg's tall, slender proportions are designed for high Nordic ceilings. Adjustable birch plywood shelves accommodate everything from coffee table books to vinyl records.

metadata.description_zh: 贝尔格高挑纤细的比例专为北欧高挑天花板设计，可调节桦木板搁板可容纳从画册到黑胶唱片的各类物品。

title: Kvist Side Table
description: Kvist's tripod form and solid oak construction make it an elegant minimal accent beside a sofa or bed. The single shelf below provides a spot for books or remotes.

metadata.description_zh: 克维斯特的三脚造型与实心橡木构造为沙发或床头提供优雅的极简装饰，下层搁板放置书籍或遥控器。

title: Luna Marble Side Table
description: Luna's circular marble top sits on a slender brushed-gold base, adding a touch of mineral luxury to Nordic interiors. Each marble top is unique with its own natural veining.

metadata.description_zh: 露娜的圆形大理石桌面立于纤细的拉丝金底座上，为北欧室内增添矿物质感的奢华。每块大理石桌面的天然纹理都是独一无二的。

title: Float Side Table
description: Float's cantilever design creates the impression of a surface hovering in space—a playful yet functional Nordic form that works as a side table or small display shelf.

metadata.description_zh: 漂浮边桌的悬臂设计营造桌面悬浮空间的视觉效果，是既有趣又实用的北欧造型，可用作边桌或小型展示架。

title: Saga Ottoman
description: The Saga ottoman doubles as extra seating and a footrest, upholstered in tactile bouclé and raised on solid beech legs. A versatile piece that complements any Nordic sofa.

metadata.description_zh: 萨迦脚凳兼作额外座位和脚凳，布克莱面料立于实心山毛榉腿上，是与任何北欧沙发相配的万能单品。

title: Stig Storage Ottoman
description: Stig's removable lid reveals a spacious storage compartment inside—a clever Nordic solution for living rooms that need to stay clutter-free.

metadata.description_zh: 斯蒂格可拆卸盖板下方藏有宽大储物空间，是维持北欧客厅整洁的聪明解决方案。

title: Mjuk Bean Bag
description: The Mjuk is the ultimate Nordic lounging companion—oversized, plush, and available in soft Nordic colour tones. The removable velvet cover is machine washable for easy care.

metadata.description_zh: 米尤克是终极北欧休闲伴侣——超大号、柔软蓬松，提供北欧柔和色调。可拆卸丝绒外套可机洗，维护轻松。

title: Kubb Cube Pouf
description: Kubb's chunky knit exterior adds handcraft Nordic warmth to any corner. The firm foam core means it functions equally well as seating or a footrest.

metadata.description_zh: 库布的粗犷针织外观为任何角落增添北欧手工温情。坚实的泡沫芯让其同时适合坐和放脚。

title: Kulla 2.5 Sofa
description: The Kulla 2.5-seater sofa is designed for couples who love stretching out—its extended width allows for a fully horizontal lounge position. Solid ash legs and a textured woven cover bring Nordic nature indoors.

metadata.description_zh: 库拉两人半沙发为喜欢横躺的伴侣而设计，加宽尺寸允许完全横躺。实心白蜡木腿与纹理编织套将北欧自然带入室内。

title: Moss Velvet Sofa
description: Deep forest-green velvet upholstery on solid birch legs—the Moss sofa brings Nordic forest colour into the living room with a contemporary sensibility. Its feather-blend cushions are sumptuously soft.

metadata.description_zh: 深森绿色丝绒面料立于实心桦木腿上，莫斯沙发将北欧森林色彩以当代气质带入客厅，羽毛混合坐垫极为柔软。

title: Vik 4-Seat Sofa
description: The Vik 4-seater accommodates the whole family for movie nights and weekend lounging. Its wide, deep seats and natural linen upholstery embody the relaxed side of Scandinavian living.

metadata.description_zh: 维克四人沙发为全家的电影夜和周末休闲提供座位，宽大深邃的座椅和天然亚麻面料体现斯堪的纳维亚生活轻松的一面。

title: Dun Cloud Sofa
description: The Dun cloud sofa earns its name with cushions that feel like sitting on air—an over-stuffed bouclé design with cloud-like proportions. Chrome legs ground the ethereal form.

metadata.description_zh: 邓云朵沙发名副其实，坐垫如坐在空气上，过度填充的布克莱设计呈现云朵般的比例，镀铬腿稳定了空灵的造型。

title: Strand Beach Sofa
description: The Strand blurs boundaries between indoor and outdoor Nordic living with weather-resistant outdoor-grade upholstery and FSC teak legs. Perfect for a summer house.

metadata.description_zh: 斯特兰德以耐候户外面料和FSC柚木腿模糊北欧室内外生活的界限，非常适合夏日别墅。

title: Berg Barrel Chair
description: The Berg barrel chair rotates on a solid oak swivel base—perfect for turning to face a conversation partner or the view from a Nordic window. Warm wool upholstery adds tactile appeal.

metadata.description_zh: 贝尔格桶椅在实心橡木旋转底座上转动，非常适合转身面向谈话伙伴或北欧窗外的景色，温暖的羊毛面料增添触感吸引力。

title: Finn Accent Chair
description: The Finn's herringbone tweed and tapered beech legs reference the heritage of Nordic textile craft. A beautifully made accent chair that serves equally well in a study or living room.

metadata.description_zh: 芬恩的人字纹粗花呢与锥形山毛榉腿参考北欧纺织工艺传统，是一把精工制作的装饰椅，适合书房或客厅。

title: Rest Meditation Chair
description: The Rest meditation chair is designed for mindful Nordic living—a low, wide seat inspired by Japanese and Scandinavian zazen culture, upholstered in organic cotton over a sustainable bamboo frame.

metadata.description_zh: 瑞斯冥想椅专为有意识的北欧生活设计，低矮宽大的座椅灵感源于日本和斯堪的纳维亚坐禅文化，有机棉面料覆盖可持续竹框架。

title: Sof Accent Chair
description: Sof's relaxed washed linen upholstery and natural pine legs capture the effortless Nordic casual aesthetic. An affordable way to bring Scandinavian softness into any room.

metadata.description_zh: 索夫的放松水洗亚麻面料与天然松木腿捕捉毫不费力的北欧休闲美学，是将斯堪的纳维亚柔软带入任何房间的实惠方式。

title: Sving Swivel Lounge Chair
description: The Sving's brass swivel base allows 360° rotation while its oversized bouclé cushions invite deep relaxation. A Nordic luxury statement for the living room.

metadata.description_zh: 斯文格的黄铜旋转底座允许360°转动，超大布克莱坐垫邀请深度放松，是客厅的北欧奢华宣言。

title: Petal Coffee Table
description: The Petal coffee table's undulating edge is inspired by natural Nordic landscapes—an organic silhouette carved from a single slab of solid oak that makes a sculptural centrepiece.

metadata.description_zh: 花瓣咖啡桌的起伏边缘灵感源于北欧自然地貌，从实心橡木单板雕刻而成的有机轮廓构成雕塑级的视觉中心。

title: Duo Two-Level Table
description: The Duo's split-level design provides distinct zones for remote controls and coffee cups above, while magazines and books sit on the lower shelf, keeping Nordic order in the living room.

metadata.description_zh: 杜奥的分层设计为遥控器和咖啡杯提供上层区域，杂志和书籍置于下层搁板，在客厅维持北欧秩序。

title: Lav Low Table
description: Lav's extra-low silhouette suits floor-level Nordic living arrangements. Square proportions and a clean oak veneer make it a minimal yet functional piece.

metadata.description_zh: 拉夫超低的轮廓适合地板级别的北欧生活方式，正方形比例与简洁橡木贴皮打造极简却实用的单品。

title: Teak Slab Table
description: This teak slab coffee table uses a single piece of solid teak with a live edge, celebrating the natural form of the wood. Slender hairpin legs provide a light counterpoint to the heavy slab.

metadata.description_zh: 这款柚木板咖啡桌使用单块带自然边缘的实心柚木，颂扬木材的天然形态。纤细的发夹腿为厚重的板材提供轻盈的对比。

title: Wide Media Console
description: The Wide media console spans a full wall in Nordic style with four soft-close doors concealing media equipment and shelving. Adjustable interior shelves accommodate any system configuration.

metadata.description_zh: 宽体媒体柜以北欧风格横贯整面墙，四扇阻尼关门遮藏媒体设备和搁架，可调节内部搁板适应任何系统配置。

title: Low-Line TV Bench
description: Nordic low-line aesthetics at their finest—this walnut veneer TV bench sits close to the floor on tapered solid legs, providing a sleek, unobtrusive foundation for any flat-screen TV.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧低矮美学的最佳体现，这款胡桃木贴皮电视柜以锥形实心腿紧贴地面，为任何平板电视提供简洁低调的基础。

title: TV Unit with Fireplace
description: This contemporary Nordic TV unit integrates an electric flame-effect fireplace for the warmth and hygge of a traditional hearth without installation complexity.

metadata.description_zh: 这款当代北欧电视柜集成电动仿焰壁炉，无需复杂安装即可带来传统炉边的温暖与hygge感。

title: Leaning Ladder Shelf
description: Five progressively wider shelves lean in a ladder formation against the wall—a space-efficient Nordic display system that requires no wall fixing.

metadata.description_zh: 五个逐渐变宽的搁板以阶梯形式倚墙而立，是无需固定墙壁的节省空间北欧展示系统。

title: Cube Bookcase
description: The Cube bookcase arranges storage in a grid of 8 equal compartments—a modular Nordic system that works as bookshelves, display cabinets, or closed storage with optional doors.

metadata.description_zh: 方格书柜将储物空间排列为8个等大方格，是一个模块化北欧系统，可用作书架、展示柜或配可选门的封闭储物。

title: Industrial Pipe Shelf
description: Solid pine boards on black iron pipe brackets—the Scandinavian-industrial hybrid bookcase that adds textural contrast to a minimal Nordic space.

metadata.description_zh: 实心松木板与黑色铁管托架，斯堪的纳维亚工业混合书架为极简北欧空间增添纹理对比。

title: C-Table Laptop Tray
description: The C-table slides neatly under a sofa, positioning a surface exactly where you need it for a laptop, breakfast, or book. A Nordic functional solution in a minimal silhouette.

metadata.description_zh: C型桌可整洁地滑入沙发下方，将桌面精准定位到您需要的地方以放笔记本、早餐或书，是极简轮廓的北欧实用解决方案。

title: Drum Side Table
description: The Drum side table's cylindrical form is a Nordic take on the classic drum table—a stable, space-efficient surface with hidden storage inside the drum body.

metadata.description_zh: 鼓形边桌的圆柱形态是北欧对经典鼓桌的诠释，稳定节省空间的桌面，鼓体内部有隐藏储物空间。

title: Plant Stand
description: The Plant Stand's slender single-post design raises a plant or object into prominence. Its minimal footprint and solid oak construction are classically Nordic.

metadata.description_zh: 植物架的纤细单柱设计将植物或物品提升至显眼位置，极小的占地面积与实心橡木构造是经典北欧风格。

title: Round Pouf
description: The Round Pouf is hand-woven from natural jute with a firm foam interior—an organic Nordic accent for any living room floor. Its neutral tone works with any colour palette.

metadata.description_zh: 圆形蒲团以天然黄麻手工编织，内含坚实泡沫，是任何客厅地板的有机北欧装饰品，中性色调适配任何配色方案。

title: Velvet Cube Ottoman
description: A perfect square of plush velvet on solid oak legs—the Velvet Cube Ottoman provides additional seating or a stylish footrest in any Nordic living room or bedroom.

metadata.description_zh: 在实心橡木腿上完美方形的华丽丝绒，丝绒方形脚凳在任何北欧客厅或卧室提供额外座位或时尚搁脚凳。

title: Linen Floor Cushion
description: The Linen Floor Cushion is the most relaxed Nordic seating option—a generous round linen cushion filled with natural kapok for floor-level lounging in Scandinavian style.

metadata.description_zh: 亚麻地板垫是最休闲的北欧坐席选择，宽大的圆形亚麻垫填充天然木棉，以斯堪的纳维亚风格在地板上休闲。

title: Giant Bean Bag
description: The Giant Bean Bag is a family-sized Nordic lounger—big enough for two adults or a parent with children. Microsuede cover resists stains and is removable for washing.

metadata.description_zh: 超大豆袋椅是家庭号北欧躺椅，大到足以容纳两个成人或一个家长与孩子，防污仿麂皮套可拆卸清洗。

title: Kids Bean Bag
description: A child-sized Nordic bean bag in soft cotton canvas with fun Scandinavian geometric patterns. The zipper cover is machine washable for easy maintenance.

metadata.description_zh: 儿童号北欧豆袋椅以柔软棉帆布印有有趣的斯堪的纳维亚几何图案，拉链套可机洗便于维护。

title: Halvø Peninsula Sofa
description: The Halvø peninsula sofa creates its own intimate zone within an open-plan Nordic home. Its dramatic peninsula chaise and premium performance fabric make it perfect for families with children and pets.

metadata.description_zh: 哈尔弗岛半岛沙发在开放式北欧家居中创造自己的私密区域，戏剧性的半岛贵妃椅与高性能面料使其非常适合有孩子和宠物的家庭。

title: Skum Sofa
description: Skum's sculptural brass frame elevates this Nordic sofa to a collector's piece. The contrast between cool metal and warm bouclé creates an irresistible tactile and visual tension.

metadata.description_zh: 斯库姆的雕塑感黄铜框架将这款北欧沙发提升为收藏级单品，冷金属与温暖布克莱之间的对比创造无法抗拒的触感和视觉张力。

title: Brim Outdoor Sofa
description: The Brim outdoor sofa is engineered for Nordic coastal living. Its lightweight aluminum frame won't rust, and olefin fabric resists UV, mildew, and moisture through all Scandinavian seasons.

metadata.description_zh: 布里姆户外沙发专为北欧海滨生活设计，轻量铝框架不会生锈，奥列芬面料抵抗所有斯堪的纳维亚季节的紫外线、霉菌和水分。

title: Nest Curved Sectional
description: The Nest curved sectional envelops its occupants in a 270° arc of Nordic comfort—an extraordinary piece for the design-forward home that wants to define its living space as an experience.

metadata.description_zh: 巢穴弧形组合沙发以270°北欧舒适弧线包裹其使用者，是设计前沿家居中将生活空间定义为体验的非凡单品。

title: Luna Accent Chair
description: Luna's clean linen upholstery and natural birch legs are as pure as a Nordic morning. This accent chair works as a bedroom reading spot, living room extra seat, or hallway greeter.

metadata.description_zh: 露娜的干净亚麻面料和天然桦木腿如北欧清晨一样纯粹，这款装饰椅可作为卧室阅读角、客厅额外座位或走廊迎客椅。

title: Pillow Chair
description: All cushion, all comfort—the Pillow Chair's oversized wraparound cushion on four solid oak legs is the Nordic answer to maximum relaxation in minimal form.

metadata.description_zh: 全是坐垫，全是舒适，抱枕椅的超大环绕坐垫立于四根实心橡木腿上，是以最少形式实现最大放松的北欧答案。

title: Minimal Accent Chair
description: True Nordic minimalism in a chair—the Minimal Accent Chair has just what is needed and nothing more. Cotton upholstery, tapered beech legs, and a frame designed to be unseen.

metadata.description_zh: 椅子中真正的北欧极简主义，极简装饰椅只有所需要的一切，没有多余的东西。棉质面料、锥形山毛榉腿和设计为隐形的框架。

title: Geo Coffee Table
description: The Geo coffee table's base is constructed from intersecting solid oak members in a geometric pattern—a sculptural Nordic conversation piece that supports a clean oak plank top.

metadata.description_zh: 几何咖啡桌的底座由交叉实心橡木构件以几何图案构造，是支撑干净橡木板桌面的雕塑感北欧谈话焦点。

title: Stack Side Coffee Tables
description: A pair of nesting circular coffee tables in powder-coated steel—use them together as a wide surface or separately as side tables. Space-efficient Nordic versatility.

metadata.description_zh: 粉末涂层钢的一对嵌套圆形咖啡桌，可组合使用作为宽阔桌面或分开作为边桌，节省空间的北欧多功能性。

title: Scandinavian Open Shelf TV
description: The Scandinavian Open Shelf TV unit proves that open storage can be organised and beautiful—three pine tiers display media equipment and Nordic objects without concealment.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧开放格电视架证明开放储物可以整洁美观，三层松木搁架展示媒体设备和北欧装饰品，无需遮藏。

title: Adjustable Modular Shelf
description: The Adjustable Modular Shelf uses a steel upright system to support birch ply shelves at any height—a classic Nordic approach to adaptable, long-lasting storage.

metadata.description_zh: 可调节模块书架使用钢立柱系统支撑任意高度的桦木板搁架，是可适应、长久耐用储物的经典北欧方式。

title: Round Footstool
description: A classic round Nordic footstool in genuine leather with turned wooden legs—an enduring companion for any armchair or sofa. Padded for comfort, crafted for longevity.

metadata.description_zh: 圆形真皮北欧脚凳配旋制木腿，是任何扶手椅或沙发的持久伴侣，软垫舒适，工艺经久。

title: Nested Coffee Table Trio
description: Three tables that nest together for flexible Nordic living—use separately as side tables, bring together as one large surface for entertaining. Oak veneer tops on minimal steel frames.

metadata.description_zh: 三张嵌套桌为灵活北欧生活设计，可分开用作边桌，也可组合成一个大桌面用于娱乐，极简钢框架上的橡木贴皮桌面。

title: Hygge Sectional
description: Designed entirely around the Danish concept of hygge, this sectional creates an intimate gathering space that encourages deep conversation and collective relaxation.

metadata.description_zh: 完全围绕丹麦hygge概念设计，这款转角沙发营造鼓励深度交流和集体放松的亲密聚会空间。

title: Studio Loveseat
description: The Studio Loveseat is a minimal Nordic seating solution ideal for small apartments and studios. Its compact size and clean lines make it a perfect city-living piece.

metadata.description_zh: 工作室双人沙发是小型公寓和单间公寓的极简北欧座椅解决方案，紧凑的尺寸和简洁的线条使其成为理想的城市生活单品。

title: Orbit Swivel Armchair
description: The Orbit swivel armchair orbits the room with effortless grace—its 360° polished chrome base and cloud-soft bouclé upholstery create a Nordic focal point for any living room.

metadata.description_zh: 轨道旋转扶手椅以轻盈优雅环绕房间，360°抛光镀铬底座和柔软的布克莱面料为任何客厅创造北欧视觉焦点。

title: High Back Chair
description: The High Back Chair's protective wings and tall back create a private Nordic enclave within any living room—perfect for reading, thinking, or simply existing in one's own space.

metadata.description_zh: 高背椅的保护性侧翼和高背在任何客厅中创造私密的北欧小世界，非常适合阅读、思考或单纯享受自己的空间。

title: Ash Wood Side Table
description: The Ash Wood Side Table's two tiers provide a practical surface above and display shelf below—the light natural colour of ash suits bright Nordic interiors.

metadata.description_zh: 白蜡木边桌的双层设计提供上方实用桌面和下方展示搁板，白蜡木的浅自然色调适合明亮的北欧室内。

title: Black Marble Coffee Table
description: The Black Marble Coffee Table is a dramatic Nordic luxury statement—Belgian black marble top on polished brass legs creates a striking contrast that anchors any sophisticated living room.

metadata.description_zh: 黑色大理石咖啡桌是戏剧性的北欧奢华宣言，比利时黑色大理石桌面立于抛光黄铜腿上，形成鲜明对比，稳定任何精致的客厅。

title: TV Unit Teak
description: Warm FSC teak with two soft-close cabinet doors—this TV unit brings natural Nordic luxury to the living room while hiding media equipment in sustainably sourced wood.

metadata.description_zh: 两扇阻尼关门的温暖FSC柚木，这款电视柜以可持续采购木材将天然北欧奢华带入客厅，同时隐藏媒体设备。

title: Coastal Sofa White
description: The Coastal Sofa in crisp white linen captures the light, airy spirit of Nordic coastal homes. Birch legs and removable washable covers make it a practical choice for bright Scandinavian rooms.

metadata.description_zh: 海岸白色沙发的洁白亚麻捕捉北欧海滨家居的明亮通透精神，桦木腿和可拆洗套使其成为明亮北欧房间的实用选择。

title: Jewel Tone Accent Chair
description: A moment of Nordic luxury in a jewel-toned velvet accent chair—deep sapphire, emerald, or ruby on slender brushed-gold legs, adding a rich focal point to any Scandinavian interior.

metadata.description_zh: 宝石色丝绒装饰椅的北欧奢华瞬间，深蓝宝石、翡翠或红宝石色调立于纤细的拉丝金腿上，为任何斯堪的纳维亚室内增添丰富视觉焦点。

title: Woven Pendant Side Table
description: The Woven Pendant Side Table brings Nordic-boho texture to the living room with its hand-woven rattan top on slim steel pin legs—a natural, organic accent piece.

metadata.description_zh: 编织吊坠边桌以手工藤编桌面立于纤细钢针腿上，为客厅带来北欧波西米亚质感，是自然有机的装饰单品。

title: Concrete Look Coffee Table
description: The Concrete Look Coffee Table delivers Nordic-industrial aesthetics with practical lightweight construction—a concrete-effect tabletop on solid oak legs that weighs a fraction of real concrete.

metadata.description_zh: 混凝土外观咖啡桌以实用的轻量构造实现北欧工业美学，实心橡木腿上的混凝土效果桌面重量仅为真正混凝土的一小部分。
metadata.material_zh: 混凝土效果桌面，橡木腿

title: Scallop Chair
description: The Scallop Chair's gently fanned back echoes the organic curves of a Nordic seashell—an accent chair that is as much sculpture as it is seating.

metadata.description_zh: 扇贝椅轻柔展开的椅背呼应北欧贝壳的有机曲线，是一把与其说是座椅不如说是雕塑的装饰椅。

title: TV Unit White Oak
description: White oak veneer with push-to-open door panels—a clean Nordic TV unit that suits bright, light-filled Scandinavian rooms where oak warmth meets white freshness.

metadata.description_zh: 白橡木贴皮配按压开门板，干净的北欧电视柜非常适合橡木温暖与白色清新相遇的明亮北欧房间。

title: Velvet Ottoman Bench
description: The Velvet Ottoman Bench works at the foot of a bed, as a coffee table, or as extra seating in a dining room—a versatile Nordic velvet piece with solid tapered wood legs.

metadata.description_zh: 丝绒脚凳长凳可用于床尾、咖啡桌或餐厅额外座椅，是配实心锥形木腿的多功能北欧丝绒单品。

title: Sherpa Sofa
description: The ultra-plush Sherpa sofa wraps you in cloud-soft comfort—its oversized sherpa cushions and solid oak legs create the ultimate Nordic winter lounging experience.

metadata.description_zh: 超柔软的舍尔巴沙发以云朵般的舒适将您包裹，超大仿羊绒坐垫与实心橡木腿打造终极北欧冬季休闲体验。

title: Rattan Armchair
description: The Rattan Armchair brings natural Nordic-coastal texture to the living room with its hand-woven rattan body and a comfortable removable cushion in natural linen.

metadata.description_zh: 藤椅以手工藤编身体和天然亚麻可拆卸坐垫为客厅带来天然北欧海滨质感。

title: Ladder Bookshelf White
description: A space-saving white ladder bookshelf in MDF—its leaning design needs no wall fixing and the white finish keeps the room feeling bright and open in true Nordic style.

metadata.description_zh: 节省空间的白色MDF梯形书架，倚墙设计无需固定墙壁，白色表面保持房间明亮开阔的真北欧风格。

title: Marble Effect Side Table
description: The Marble Effect Side Table delivers the luxury aesthetic of real marble at a fraction of the weight and cost—its faux marble top and brushed-gold base make a Nordic glamour statement.

metadata.description_zh: 大理石效果边桌以仿大理石桌面和拉丝金色底座以真大理石一小部分的重量和成本实现奢华美学。
metadata.material_zh: 仿大理石桌面，金色底座

title: Living Room Pouf
description: A Nordic-style knitted cotton pouf that works as a footrest, side table, or extra seat. Its dense knit and firm fill provide lasting shape in any living room arrangement.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧风格针织棉蒲团可用作脚凳、边桌或额外座椅，致密的针织和坚实的填充在任何客厅布置中保持持久形状。

title: Havnen Bed Frame
description: The Havnen bed frame celebrates the natural beauty of solid oak with visible joinery and clean Nordic lines. The integrated slatted base supports any mattress without the need for a box spring.

metadata.description_zh: 哈文床架以可见的榫卯工艺和简洁的北欧线条展现实心橡木的天然之美，内置板条底座无需弹簧床垫。

title: Søvn Platform Bed
description: Søvn's ultra-low platform design brings a Japanese-Nordic zen quality to the bedroom. Solid walnut construction ensures each piece has its own unique grain character.

metadata.description_zh: 瑟文超低平台设计为卧室带来日式北欧禅意，实心胡桃木确保每件作品都有独特的纹理个性。

title: Drøm Upholstered Bed
description: The Drøm upholstered bed features a tall padded headboard in natural linen for reading in bed in true Nordic style. The solid oak legs elevate the frame with warmth and craftsmanship.

metadata.description_zh: 德龙软包床的天然亚麻高靠背专为北欧风格的床上阅读而设计，实心橡木腿以温暖的工艺感提升整体。

title: Birk Storage Bed
description: Birk's hydraulic lift mechanism provides access to a generous under-bed storage area—a Nordic space-saving solution for smaller bedrooms. The oak veneer exterior maintains a premium look.

metadata.description_zh: 伯克的液压升降机构提供充裕的床下储物空间，是小型卧室的北欧节省空间方案，橡木贴皮外观保持高档质感。

title: Freja Canopy Bed
description: The Freja four-poster creates an intimate Nordic sanctuary. Solid oak posts support a draping linen canopy that filters soft morning light with natural grace.

metadata.description_zh: 弗蕾雅四柱天蓬床营造私密的北欧圣地，实心橡木柱支撑垂挂的亚麻天篷，以自然优雅过滤晨光。

title: Vik Trundle Bed
description: The Vik is ideal for children's rooms or guest rooms—a full single bed with a pull-out trundle for sleepovers. Nordic pine construction is sturdy and timeless.

metadata.description_zh: 维克非常适合儿童房或客房，一张完整单人床配抽拉式子床，专为留宿友人设计。北欧松木构造坚固且经典。

title: Bunk Bed Loke
description: Loke's solid birch bunk bed features integrated safety rails and a sturdy fixed ladder—built with Nordic precision for a child's active lifestyle.

metadata.description_zh: 洛凯实心桦木双层床配备内置安全护栏和坚固固定梯子，以北欧精准工艺为孩子的活跃生活而生。

title: Hygge Daybed
description: The Hygge daybed is the Nordic answer to the chaise longue—perfect for afternoon naps or sitting upright to read. Its linen upholstery and pine base make it equally at home in bedroom or living area.

metadata.description_zh: 海格贵妃床是北欧版贵妃椅，完美适合午睡或坐直阅读，亚麻面料与松木底座无论在卧室还是客厅都同样自然。

title: Lykta Nightstand
description: The Lykta nightstand offers everything you need bedside—a single soft-close drawer for essentials and an open shelf for books. Solid oak construction ensures generations of use.

metadata.description_zh: 吕克塔床头柜提供床边所需一切——放置必需品的阻尼关门单抽屉和放书的开放搁板，实心橡木确保数代耐用。

title: Tind Wall-Mount Nightstand
description: Tind's floating wall-mount design keeps the bedroom floor clear and creates a light, airy Nordic aesthetic. A single shelf and small drawer provide essential bedside storage.

metadata.description_zh: 提恩德壁挂设计保持卧室地面整洁，营造轻盈通透的北欧美感，单搁板和小抽屉提供基本的床边储物。

title: Birch Nightstand
description: This birch plywood nightstand brings Scandinavian design simplicity to the bedroom. Two spacious drawers on smooth runners provide ample storage, while the minimal form never overwhelms.

metadata.description_zh: 这款桦木夹板床头柜将斯堪的纳维亚设计简约带入卧室，两个在顺滑滑轨上运行的宽大抽屉提供充足储物空间。

title: Stolt 6-Drawer Dresser
description: The Stolt dresser stores a full wardrobe in six generously proportioned drawers, each with solid brass bar handles that develop a beautiful patina over time.

metadata.description_zh: 斯托尔特斗柜在六个宽大抽屉中储存一整衣橱，每个抽屉配备随时间愈显韵味的实心黄铜条形拉手。

title: Alma Chest of Drawers
description: Alma's tall, narrow proportions are designed for compact Nordic bedrooms. Five deep drawers on smooth metal runners provide excellent storage without taking up precious floor space.

metadata.description_zh: 阿尔玛高挑纤细的比例专为紧凑的北欧卧室设计，五个深抽屉在顺滑金属滑轨上运行，在不占用宝贵地面空间的前提下提供出色储物。

title: Hjem Wardrobe
description: The Hjem wardrobe provides a complete bedroom storage solution with hanging rails, adjustable shelves, and integrated drawers. Solid pine construction makes it a lasting investment.

metadata.description_zh: 海恩衣柜通过挂衣杆、可调节搁板和内置抽屉提供完整的卧室储物方案，实心松木构造是经久耐用的投资。

title: Mörk Sliding Wardrobe
description: Mörk's mirrored sliding doors visually double the size of any bedroom while concealing a fully fitted wardrobe interior. The mirror-door design is a Nordic space-maximising classic.

metadata.description_zh: 莫克的镜面推拉门在视觉上将卧室空间放大一倍，同时隐藏内部完善的衣柜配置，镜面门设计是北欧空间最大化的经典方案。

title: Dröm Memory Foam Mattress
description: The Dröm mattress combines a pressure-relieving memory foam layer with a breathable Tencel cover for a perfectly balanced Nordic sleep experience. Certified free of harmful substances.

metadata.description_zh: 德龙床垫将减压记忆棉层与透气天丝外套结合，打造完美平衡的北欧睡眠体验，经有害物质无害认证。

title: Fjell Pocket Spring Mattress
description: Fjell's individually wrapped pocket springs respond to every movement independently, while the natural latex comfort layer adds gentle pressure relief. Ideal for couples with different sleep preferences.

metadata.description_zh: 菲尔的独立袋装弹簧对每个动作单独响应，天然乳胶舒适层提供温柔减压，非常适合睡眠偏好不同的伴侣。

title: Speil Vanity Desk
description: The Speil vanity desk blends Nordic minimalism with feminine grace—its arched brass mirror and drawer-equipped ash desk create a beautiful morning ritual space.

metadata.description_zh: 斯派尔梳妆台融合北欧极简与女性优雅，拱形黄铜镜与带抽屉的白蜡木桌面打造美好的晨间仪式空间。

title: Oval Stand Mirror
description: This full-length oval mirror leans naturally against the wall or stands independently on its base, making it versatile for any Nordic bedroom or dressing area.

metadata.description_zh: 这款全身椭圆镜可自然倚墙而立或独立站立，非常适合北欧卧室或更衣区。

title: Ek Solid Oak Bed
description: The Ek bed's angled legs give it a distinctive Nordic leaning silhouette—a subtle design detail that references traditional Scandinavian timber joinery.

metadata.description_zh: 艾克床的斜角腿赋予其独特的北欧倾斜轮廓，一个微妙的设计细节参考了传统斯堪的纳维亚木材榫卯。

title: Birch Single Bed
description: A clean, simple Nordic single bed in solid birch—perfect for guest rooms, children's rooms, or first apartments. The slatted base accommodates any mattress without the need for a box spring.

metadata.description_zh: 实心桦木简洁干净的北欧单人床，非常适合客房、儿童房或初次独立公寓，板条底座无需弹簧床垫。

title: Metal Industrial Bed
description: The Metal bed frame brings a Nordic-industrial edge to the bedroom with its powder-coated steel construction and geometric headboard. A rugged yet refined sleeping frame.

metadata.description_zh: 金属床架以粉末涂层钢构造和几何床头板为卧室带来北欧工业感，是粗犷而精致的睡眠框架。

title: Kids Bed with Canopy
description: A magical Nordic playhouse bed for children—solid pine construction with a dreamy cotton canopy that turns bedtime into an adventure. Safe, sturdy, and certified.

metadata.description_zh: 神奇的北欧儿童游戏屋床，实心松木配梦幻棉质天篷将就寝时间变成冒险，安全坚固且经认证。

title: King Size Platform Bed
description: Our largest platform bed in solid walnut—the ultimate Nordic luxury sleeping experience for those who value space and material quality above all else.

metadata.description_zh: 我们最大的实心胡桃木平台床，是将空间和材料品质置于首位的终极北欧奢华睡眠体验。

title: Adjustable Base Bed
description: The Adjustable Base Bed allows head and foot elevation at the touch of a button—a Scandinavian wellness investment for those who read, work, or sleep at customised angles.

metadata.description_zh: 可调节底座床允许轻触按钮升高头部和脚部，是为喜欢在自定义角度阅读、工作或睡眠的人准备的斯堪的纳维亚健康投资。

title: Floating Pair Nightstands
description: A matching pair of wall-mounted nightstands in oak plywood—bought together for perfect symmetry. Each has a single drawer and open shelf to keep bedside essentials organised.

metadata.description_zh: 一对匹配的橡木夹板壁挂床头柜，成对购买以实现完美对称。每个有一个抽屉和开放搁板整理床头必需品。

title: Nordic Brass Nightstand
description: Solid oak drawers on polished brass legs—a Nordic jewel for the bedside. The warm contrast between the oak and brass creates a refined bedroom composition.

metadata.description_zh: 实心橡木抽屉立于抛光黄铜腿上，是床头边的北欧珠宝，橡木与黄铜之间的温暖对比创造精致的卧室构图。

title: Scandinavian Bedside Table
description: A bright white Nordic bedside table on hairpin legs—clean, airy, and affordable. The single drawer keeps the bedside surface clear while providing essential storage beneath.

metadata.description_zh: 发夹腿上明亮的白色北欧床头桌，简洁通透且实惠。单个抽屉保持床头桌面整洁，同时在下方提供必要的储物空间。

title: Tall Boy Dresser
description: The Tall Boy dresser maximises bedroom storage within a narrow footprint—five generous drawers in solid oak with integrated handles that maintain a clean Nordic silhouette.

metadata.description_zh: 高斗柜在狭窄的占地面积内最大化卧室储物，实心橡木的五个宽大抽屉配集成拉手，保持干净的北欧轮廓。

title: Low Wide Dresser
description: The Low Wide dresser doubles as a TV console or display surface—its wide, low proportions suit any Nordic bedroom while six deep drawers store a full wardrobe.

metadata.description_zh: 低宽斗柜兼作电视柜或展示面，宽低的比例适合任何北欧卧室，六个深抽屉存储整个衣橱。

title: Compact Single Wardrobe
description: A compact single-door wardrobe ideal for small Nordic bedrooms or as a dedicated coat storage solution. Clean lines and birch ply construction are quintessentially Scandinavian.

metadata.description_zh: 紧凑的单门衣柜非常适合小型北欧卧室或作为专用外套储物解决方案，简洁的线条和桦木板构造是典型的斯堪的纳维亚风格。

title: Open Wardrobe Frame
description: An open wardrobe frame in the Nordic tradition of transparent living—no doors, no hiding, just beautifully displayed clothing on a powder-coated steel rail system with wooden shelves.

metadata.description_zh: 开放式衣橱框架体现北欧透明生活传统，没有门，没有隐藏，只是在粉末涂层钢轨系统与木质搁板上美丽展示的衣物。

title: Natural Latex Mattress
description: The Natural Latex Mattress uses pure Talalay latex for responsive, pressure-relieving support that adapts to every sleeping position. The organic cotton cover is breathable and sustainably produced.

metadata.description_zh: 天然乳胶床垫使用纯Talalay乳胶提供响应性、减压支撑，适应每种睡姿，有机棉套透气且可持续生产。

title: Hybrid Foam Spring Mattress
description: The Hybrid mattress combines the contouring comfort of foam with the responsive support of pocket springs—a balanced Nordic sleep solution for all sleeping positions.

metadata.description_zh: 混合床垫将泡沫的塑形舒适与袋装弹簧的响应支撑相结合，是适合所有睡姿的平衡北欧睡眠解决方案。

title: Children's Foam Mattress
description: The Children's foam mattress is designed for growing Nordic children—CertiPUR certified foam for safe sleeping, with a removable waterproof cover for practical parent-friendly maintenance.

metadata.description_zh: 儿童泡沫床垫专为成长中的北欧儿童设计，CertiPUR认证泡沫提供安全睡眠，可拆卸防水套便于家长维护。

title: Mirrored Dressing Table
description: The Mirrored Dressing Table brings glamorous Nordic light to the bedroom with its fully mirrored surfaces and chrome hardware. A Hollywood-inspired piece with Scandinavian restraint.

metadata.description_zh: 镜面梳妆桌以全镜面和镀铬五金为卧室带来迷人的北欧光芒，是好莱坞灵感与斯堪的纳维亚克制结合的作品。

title: Round Gold Mirror
description: The Round Gold Mirror is a Nordic sun-inspired wall piece—polished brass frame around a clear mirror that catches and amplifies natural light throughout the day.

metadata.description_zh: 圆形金色镜子是受北欧太阳启发的墙饰，抛光黄铜框围绕透明镜面，全天捕捉并放大自然光。

title: Full-Length Arch Mirror
description: The Full-Length Arch Mirror's sweeping arched oak frame is a Nordic statement piece for any bedroom or hallway. The proportions are carefully calculated to reflect the full human figure in flattering light.

metadata.description_zh: 全身拱形镜的弧形橡木框架是任何卧室或走廊的北欧宣言单品，比例经过精心计算，以讨喜的光线映照完整人形。

title: Antique Nordic Mirror
description: This Nordic mirror's distressed oak frame gives it a heritage quality—as if it has been passed down through generations of Scandinavian households, each layer of patina telling a new story.

metadata.description_zh: 这款北欧镜的仿旧橡木框架赋予其传承品质，仿佛经几代斯堪的纳维亚家庭传承，每层包浆都讲述新故事。

title: Princess Single Bed
description: The Princess Single Bed is a fairy-tale Nordic piece for children's rooms—solid pine with carved headboard details and a safe, sturdy frame that grows with your child.

metadata.description_zh: 公主单人床是儿童房的童话北欧单品，实心松木配雕刻床头板细节和安全坚固的框架，随孩子成长。

title: Leather Headboard Bed
description: The full-grain leather upholstered headboard gives this bed a Nordic-luxe hotel feeling—every stitch is hand-finished and the leather develops a beautiful patina over years of use.

metadata.description_zh: 全粒面皮革软包床头板赋予这张床北欧奢华酒店的感觉，每针缝线都是手工完成的，皮革随使用年限形成美丽的包浆。
metadata.material_zh: 全粒面皮革床头板，橡木

title: Day Bed Trundle
description: A Nordic multitasker: use the Daybed as a sofa during the day and extend the hidden trundle for overnight guests at night. Both frames in solid oak with linen cushions.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧多功能：白天将贵妃床用作沙发，晚上伸展隐藏的子母床供夜宿客人使用，两个框架均为带亚麻坐垫的实心橡木。

title: Wall Bed Cabinet
description: The Wall Bed Cabinet conceals a full double mattress behind cabinet doors—the ultimate Nordic space-saving solution for studios and guest rooms that transforms from wardrobe to bedroom in seconds.

metadata.description_zh: 壁床柜在柜门后隐藏一张完整双人床垫，是公寓和客房的终极北欧节省空间解决方案，几秒内从衣柜变为卧室。

title: Bamboo Nightstand
description: The Bamboo Nightstand is a sustainable Nordic choice for the bedroom—solid bamboo construction, a smooth drawer, and an open lower shelf create a functional yet beautiful bedside companion.

metadata.description_zh: 竹制床头柜是卧室的可持续北欧选择，实心竹构造、顺滑抽屉和开放下层搁板创造实用而美观的床边伴侣。

title: Mirrored Nightstand
description: The Mirrored Nightstand catches and reflects Nordic candlelight for a magical bedroom atmosphere. Two drawers keep bedside essentials tidy within a glamorous glass exterior.

metadata.description_zh: 镜面床头柜捕捉并反射北欧烛光，营造神奇的卧室氛围，两个抽屉在迷人的玻璃外表内保持床头必需品整洁。

title: Painted White Dresser
description: The Painted White Dresser is a Scandinavian bedroom staple—clean white, soft-close drawers, and a minimalist design that works in any Nordic colour scheme from crisp white to deep forest green.

metadata.description_zh: 白色涂漆斗柜是北欧卧室主力，干净的白色、阻尼关门抽屉和极简设计适配从纯白到深森绿的任何北欧配色方案。

title: Wood and Steel Dresser
description: Solid oak drawer fronts float within a powder-coated steel frame—a Nordic-industrial dresser that combines the warmth of natural wood with the precision of engineered metal.

metadata.description_zh: 实心橡木抽屉面板悬浮于粉末涂层钢框架内，是结合天然木材温暖与工程金属精准的北欧工业斗柜。

title: Ultra Firm Ortho Mattress
description: The Ultra Firm Ortho Mattress is designed for Nordic sleepers who prefer strong spinal support—high-density orthopaedic foam with a breathable organic cotton cover.

metadata.description_zh: 超硬矫形床垫专为偏好强脊椎支撑的北欧睡眠者设计，高密度矫形泡沫配透气有机棉套。

title: Kids Bunk Mattress
description: The Kids Bunk Mattress is designed thin enough for safety on an upper bunk while providing comfortable Nordic sleep for growing children. CertiPUR certified foam is free of harmful substances.

metadata.description_zh: 儿童双层床垫设计得足够薄以在上铺保持安全，同时为成长中的孩子提供舒适的北欧睡眠，CertiPUR认证泡沫不含有害物质。

title: Black Frame Mirror
description: The Black Frame Mirror is a graphic Nordic statement—a simple rectangular mirror in a bold powder-coated steel frame that creates strong visual contrast against white Nordic walls.

metadata.description_zh: 黑框镜子是图形化的北欧宣言，简单的矩形镜子在大胆的粉末涂层钢框中，在白色北欧墙壁上创造强烈的视觉对比。

title: Triptych Dressing Mirror
description: The Triptych Dressing Mirror's three hinged panels allow for angled viewing—a practical Nordic dressing solution that doubles as a sculptural bedroom room divider.

metadata.description_zh: 三联梳妆镜的三个铰链面板允许角度查看，是实用的北欧梳妆方案，同时兼作雕塑感卧室隔断。

title: Wooden Slatted Bed
description: The Wooden Slatted Bed's architectural headboard of vertical ash slats creates a light, airy Nordic pattern that reads as both headboard and room divider from the other side.

metadata.description_zh: 木质板条床的垂直白蜡木板条建筑感床头板创造轻盈通透的北欧图案，从另一侧既可作为床头板也可作为房间隔断。
metadata.material_zh: 实心白蜡木，可见板条床头

title: Upholstered Storage Bed
description: A king-size luxury with premium velvet headboard and hydraulic under-bed storage—the ultimate Nordic bedroom statement that combines materiality, comfort, and practical function.

metadata.description_zh: 特大号豪华床配优质丝绒床头和液压床下储物，结合材质、舒适与实用功能的终极北欧卧室宣言。

title: Dresser with Mirror
description: The Dresser with Mirror combines five spacious drawers with an integrated dressing mirror—a Nordic bedroom centrepiece that reduces clutter by combining two essential functions.

metadata.description_zh: 带镜斗柜将五个宽大抽屉与集成梳妆镜结合，是通过合并两个基本功能减少杂乱的北欧卧室核心家具。

title: Wardrobe with Drawers
description: The Wardrobe with Drawers is a complete Nordic bedroom storage solution—two hanging sections with a deep drawer tower in between handles a whole wardrobe with Scandinavian efficiency.

metadata.description_zh: 带抽屉衣柜是完整的北欧卧室储物解决方案，两个挂衣区中间夹着深抽屉塔，以斯堪的纳维亚效率处理整个衣橱。

title: Pillow Top Mattress
description: The Pillow Top Mattress adds an extra layer of plush Nordic sleeping luxury—individually wrapped pocket springs with a generous quilted pillow top for ultimate cloud-like comfort.

metadata.description_zh: 枕顶床垫增添额外一层丰盈的北欧睡眠奢华，独立袋装弹簧配宽大的绗缝枕顶实现终极云朵般舒适。

title: Nordic Poster Bed
description: The Nordic Poster Bed's four solid birch posts create a frame that can be dressed with curtains, fairy lights, or left clean for a minimal Scandinavian statement.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧四柱床的四根实心桦木柱创造可以装饰窗帘、串灯或保持干净作为极简北欧宣言的框架。

title: Linen Chest
description: The Linen Chest is a Nordic bedroom essential—a beautiful linen-covered storage box that sits at the foot of the bed and stores extra blankets, pillows, and bed linen.

metadata.description_zh: 亚麻储物箱是北欧卧室必备，放置于床尾的美丽亚麻覆盖储物箱，存放额外毯子、枕头和床上用品。

title: Japanese Platform Bed
description: The Japanese Platform Bed draws on the tradition of Nordic-Japanese design minimalism—an ultra-low solid pine frame that sits just 25 cm from the floor for a Zen sleeping experience.

metadata.description_zh: 日式平台床汲取北欧日式设计极简主义传统，超低的实心松木框架距地面仅25厘米，提供禅意睡眠体验。

title: Rattan Pendant Bedside
description: The Rattan Hanging Bedside Tray suspends from the ceiling beside the bed, holding books, phone, and a glass of water without occupying precious floor space.

metadata.description_zh: 藤编悬挂床头托盘从天花板悬挂于床旁，存放书籍、手机和一杯水，不占用宝贵的地面空间。

title: Kids Cabin Bed
description: The Kids Cabin Bed transforms a child's room into an adventure space—solid pine construction with a raised sleeping platform, integrated slide or ladder, and under-bed play area.

metadata.description_zh: 儿童阁楼床将儿童房变成冒险空间，实心松木构造配升高睡眠平台、集成滑梯或梯子和床下游乐区。

title: Capsule Wardrobe Organiser
description: The Capsule Wardrobe Organiser is a minimalist Nordic open clothes rail—chrome steel uprights with hanging rails and shelves designed for a curated, clutter-free capsule wardrobe.

metadata.description_zh: 胶囊衣橱整理是极简北欧开放衣架，带挂衣杆和搁架的镀铬钢立柱专为精选无杂乱的胶囊衣橱设计。

title: Bedside Reading Light
description: The Bedside Reading Light clips to any headboard or nightstand, positioning warm adjustable LED light exactly where you need it for Nordic late-night reading.

metadata.description_zh: 床头阅读灯夹于任何床头板或床头柜上，将温暖可调节LED光线精准定位至北欧深夜阅读所需之处。

title: Holm Oak Dining Table
description: The Holm dining table is a celebration of solid oak—its wide planks showcase natural grain and knots that tell the story of the tree. Designed to gather family and friends in the Nordic tradition.

metadata.description_zh: 霍尔姆餐桌是对实心橡木的礼赞，宽幅板面展现天然纹理与木节，诉说树木的故事。专为在北欧传统中汇聚家人与朋友而设计。

title: Rund Round Dining Table
description: The Rund's circular form promotes equal conversation, perfectly embodying the Nordic democratic dining tradition. A dramatic marble top pairs with a sculptural solid walnut pedestal base.

metadata.description_zh: 伦德的圆形设计促进平等交流，完美体现北欧民主的餐桌传统，精彩的大理石桌面搭配雕塑感实心胡桃木底座。

title: Extend Extendable Table
description: The Extend table grows with your needs—a central butterfly extension mechanism adds 80 cm to accommodate larger gatherings with no extra parts to store.

metadata.description_zh: 伸缩餐桌随需求成长，中央蝴蝶延伸机构无需额外零件储存，即可增加80厘米以容纳更大聚会。

title: Björk Trestle Table
description: The Björk trestle table draws on traditional Nordic workshop aesthetics, with a thick pine plank top and sturdy solid oak trestle bases that can be dismantled for easy moving.

metadata.description_zh: 白桦锯架餐桌汲取北欧传统工坊美学，厚实松木板桌面搭配坚固的实心橡木锯架底座，可拆卸便于搬移。

title: Kyst Coastal Dining Table
description: The Kyst's bleached oak surface and clean white structure capture the light, airy feeling of Nordic coastal homes. The timeless form pairs with any dining chair style.

metadata.description_zh: 科斯特的漂白橡木桌面和洁白框架捕捉北欧海滨家居的明亮通透感，经典造型与任何餐椅风格相配。

title: Lana Oval Dining Table
description: Lana's oval form is the most social of table shapes—no sharp corners and a continuous curve that makes everyone feel central. Solid walnut brings warmth and luxury.

metadata.description_zh: 拉娜的椭圆形是最具社交感的桌型，没有尖角，连续的曲线让每个人都感觉身处中心，实心胡桃木带来温暖与奢华。

title: Arne Dining Chair
description: The Arne is a modern interpretation of a Nordic classic—its cane back provides lightness and ventilation while solid oak legs ensure lasting durability. Stackable for easy storage.

metadata.description_zh: 阿恩是北欧经典的现代诠释，藤编背提供轻盈感与透气性，实心橡木腿确保经久耐用，可叠放便于储存。

title: Saga Upholstered Dining Chair
description: The Saga brings living room comfort to the dining table. Its fully upholstered seat and back in plush velvet make extended dinner conversations a pleasure.

metadata.description_zh: 萨迦将客厅舒适带入餐桌，全软包的丝绒椅座和椅背让漫长的餐后聊天成为享受。

title: Kinn Wooden Chair
description: Kinn celebrates the enduring appeal of all-wood Scandinavian chair design. Its gentle curves are shaped for comfortable sitting, and the solid beech construction will last a lifetime.

metadata.description_zh: 金恩颂扬北欧全木椅设计的持久魅力，轻柔的曲线塑造舒适坐感，实心山毛榉构造可用一生。

title: Hay-Style Wire Chair
description: This wire chair is a Scandinavian icon updated for the modern home—the open steel wire construction is both visually light and surprisingly comfortable with its subtle seat flex.

metadata.description_zh: 线椅是为现代家居更新的北欧图标，开放钢线构造在视觉上轻盈，细微的椅座弹性出人意料地舒适。

title: Stol Bench
description: The Stol bench brings flexible Nordic seating to the dining table—it can seat three, slide under the table when not in use, and move easily around the home.

metadata.description_zh: 斯托尔长凳为餐桌提供灵活的北欧坐席，可坐三人，不用时可推入桌下，且易于在家中移动。

title: Vik Bar Stool
description: The Vik bar stool adjusts to fit counter or bar height with a simple gas-lift mechanism. Its clean lines and solid oak seat complement any Scandinavian kitchen.

metadata.description_zh: 维克吧凳通过简单的气动升降机构调节台面或吧台高度，简洁的线条与实心橡木椅座与任何北欧厨房相配。

title: Rema Swivel Stool
description: The Rema swivel stool brings Nordic-contemporary style to the kitchen island. Its 360° swivel and adjustable height work across bar and counter applications.

metadata.description_zh: 雷玛旋转高凳为厨房岛台带来北欧当代风格，360°旋转与可调节高度适用于吧台和台面各种场合。

title: Ryd Sideboard
description: The Ryd sideboard provides generous dining room storage behind its elegant sliding oak doors, with an open shelf at the top for displaying Nordic objects.

metadata.description_zh: 吕德餐边柜在优雅的推拉橡木门后提供充裕的餐厅储物空间，顶部开放搁板展示北欧装饰品。

title: Bod Buffet Cabinet
description: The Bod's generous proportions serve a dining room or hallway equally well. Soft-close cabinet doors and deep drawers handle everything from tablecloths to tableware.

metadata.description_zh: 博德宽大的尺寸同样适合餐厅或玄关，阻尼关门柜门和深抽屉可收纳桌布到餐具的一切物品。

title: Gin Bar Cart
description: The Gin bar cart is a Nordic entertainer's essential—solid oak shelves on polished brass wheels that roll effortlessly from kitchen to dining room for cocktail service.

metadata.description_zh: 杜松子酒吧车是北欧娱乐必备，实心橡木搁板配抛光黄铜轮，轻松从厨房滚至餐厅提供鸡尾酒服务。

title: Concrete Dining Table
description: The Concrete Dining Table pairs a smooth fibre-reinforced concrete top with solid oak legs—a striking Nordic-industrial combination that anchors a dining room with raw elemental beauty.

metadata.description_zh: 混凝土餐桌将光滑的纤维增强混凝土桌面与实心橡木腿搭配，是一个将原始元素之美固定于餐厅的北欧工业组合。
metadata.material_zh: 纤维混凝土桌面，橡木腿

title: Glass Top Dining Table
description: The Glass Top Dining Table brings an airy Nordic lightness to the dining room. A 15mm tempered glass top on a sculptural solid walnut base creates a visually weightless composition.

metadata.description_zh: 玻璃桌面餐桌为餐厅带来通透的北欧轻盈感，15毫米钢化玻璃桌面立于雕塑感实心胡桃木底座上，创造视觉上无重量的构图。

title: Live Edge Dining Table
description: Each Live Edge Dining Table is a unique piece of Nordic nature art—a solid walnut slab preserving the natural edge of the tree forms the top, supported by a minimal steel base.

metadata.description_zh: 每张活边餐桌都是一件独特的北欧自然艺术品，保留树木天然边缘的实心胡桃木板构成桌面，由极简钢铁底座支撑。

title: Farmhouse Pine Table
description: The Farmhouse Pine Table is inspired by traditional Nordic rural dining—thick solid pine planks and cross-leg construction create a sturdy, characterful table that fits a Nordic country kitchen.

metadata.description_zh: 农舍松木桌灵感源于传统北欧农村就餐，厚实的实心松木板和十字腿构造打造坚固有个性的桌子，适合北欧乡村厨房。

title: Compact Apartment Table
description: The Compact Apartment Table is designed for Nordic urban living—proportioned for 2-4 people in a small dining area, with clean birch ply construction and tapered legs.

metadata.description_zh: 紧凑公寓餐桌专为北欧城市生活设计，为小型用餐区的2-4人设计比例，桦木板构造配锥形腿。

title: Mesh Dining Chair
description: The Mesh Dining Chair is a contemporary Nordic classic—its moulded polypropylene mesh seat and back flex with the body while remaining supremely lightweight and stackable.

metadata.description_zh: 网状餐椅是当代北欧经典，模塑聚丙烯网座椅和椅背随身体弯曲，同时保持超轻且可叠放。

title: Leather Dining Chair
description: PU leather upholstery and solid oak legs give this dining chair a premium Nordic hotel aesthetic. Easy to wipe clean and fade-resistant—ideal for families.

metadata.description_zh: PU皮革面料和实心橡木腿赋予这款餐椅高级北欧酒店美感，易于擦拭且不褪色，非常适合家庭使用。

title: Solid Pine Dining Chair
description: This all-solid-pine dining chair is an honest, durable Nordic choice. The natural grain of the pine gives each chair a unique character, and they stack neatly for smaller spaces.

metadata.description_zh: 这款全实心松木餐椅是诚实耐用的北欧选择，松木的天然纹理给每把椅子独特个性，且可整洁叠放于小空间。

title: Upholstered Armchair Dining
description: Add lounge chair comfort to the dining table with this upholstered armchair dining chair. Bouclé upholstery and solid beech arms create a Nordic luxury dining experience.

metadata.description_zh: 以这款软包扶手餐椅为餐桌增添休闲椅舒适感，布克莱面料和实心山毛榉扶手创造北欧奢华就餐体验。

title: Scandinavian Tulip Chair
description: A Nordic interpretation of the iconic tulip chair—a moulded polypropylene shell on a single powder-coated aluminum pedestal base. Elegant, functional, and stackable.

metadata.name_zh: 斯堪的纳维亚郁金香椅
metadata.description_zh: 北欧对标志性郁金香椅的诠释，模塑聚丙烯外壳立于单根粉末涂层铝底座上，优雅、实用且可叠放。

title: Solid Oak Bar Stool
description: Simple and beautiful—this solid oak bar stool needs no adjustment mechanism because its proportions are calibrated for standard bar height. A Nordic classic that improves with age.

metadata.description_zh: 简单而美丽，这款实心橡木吧凳不需要调节机构，因为其比例专为标准吧台高度校准，是随时间愈发迷人的北欧经典。

title: Rattan Bar Stool
description: Hand-woven rattan seat on slim metal legs—a Nordic-boho bar stool that adds natural texture to a kitchen island or breakfast bar.

metadata.description_zh: 手工藤编座面立于纤细金属腿上，是为厨房岛台或早餐吧台增添天然纹理的北欧波西米亚吧凳。

title: Backless Counter Stool
description: A simple Nordic round-top counter stool in solid pine—no back, no fuss. Stackable and lightweight, it is ideal for kitchen islands where space flexibility matters.

metadata.description_zh: 实心松木无背简约北欧圆顶台面凳，没有靠背，没有麻烦，可叠放且轻便，非常适合空间灵活性重要的厨房岛台。

title: Scandinavian Narrow Sideboard
description: The Scandinavian Narrow Sideboard fits into tight dining rooms and hallways with its compact 38 cm depth. Two doors conceal shelving that handles everything from tableware to household admin files.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧窄型边柜以紧凑的38厘米深度适合狭小的餐厅和走廊，两扇门遮藏的搁架可处理从餐具到家庭文件的一切。

title: Hinge Open Sideboard
description: The Hinge Open Sideboard's push-to-open mechanism means no visible handles—a seamless Nordic surface that conceals a generously proportioned interior with adjustable shelving.

metadata.description_zh: 翻转开门餐边柜的按压开门机构意味着无可见拉手，无缝的北欧表面隐藏着配可调节搁架的宽大内部空间。

title: Brass Drinks Trolley
description: The Brass Drinks Trolley elevates pre-dinner drinks to a Nordic ritual. Polished brass frame and smoked glass shelves create a sophisticated mobile drinks station.

metadata.description_zh: 黄铜饮品推车将餐前饮品提升为北欧仪式，抛光黄铜框架和烟灰玻璃搁板打造精致的移动饮品站。

title: Rustic Drinks Cart
description: A Nordic farmhouse-style drinks cart in solid pine with aged iron wheels. Its rustic charm suits a country house or any Scandinavian interior that values the beauty of natural materials.

metadata.description_zh: 实心松木配仿旧铁轮的北欧农舍风饮品车，质朴的魅力适合乡村别墅或任何重视天然材料之美的北欧室内。

title: Industrial Dining Table
description: The Industrial Dining Table pairs a thick solid pine plank top with sturdy black powder-coated steel legs—a Nordic-industrial design that works in everything from loft apartments to country kitchens.

metadata.description_zh: 工业餐桌将厚实的实心松木板桌面与坚固的黑色粉末涂层钢腿搭配，是从loft公寓到乡村厨房皆适用的北欧工业设计。

title: Nordic Kitchen Table
description: A simple Nordic kitchen table for everyday family meals—birch plywood with a natural oil finish that develops character with daily use. Compact enough for most kitchens.

metadata.description_zh: 简单的北欧厨房桌用于日常家庭用餐，天然油处理的桦木夹板随日常使用形成独特个性，足够紧凑适合大多数厨房。

title: Teak Indoor Dining Table
description: The Teak Indoor Dining Table brings the warmth of sustainably sourced teak indoors. Smooth-planed surfaces and tight joinery reflect Nordic precision woodworking.

metadata.description_zh: 柚木室内餐桌将可持续采购的柚木温暖带入室内，平整刨面和紧密的榫卯工艺体现北欧精准木工技艺。

title: Crossback Chair
description: The Crossback Chair is a Nordic farmhouse dining icon—solid pine with a distinctive crossed-bar back that is stackable and extremely durable. A timeless choice for any kitchen.

metadata.description_zh: 十字背椅是北欧农舍餐椅图标，实心松木配独特的十字杆背，可叠放且极为耐用，是任何厨房的永恒之选。

title: Wishbone Style Chair
description: A Nordic icon—the wishbone-shaped back in solid beech with a hand-woven paper cord seat. This chair has been celebrated in Scandinavian design history for decades.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧图标，实心山毛榉Y形背配手工编织纸绳坐面，这把椅子在斯堪的纳维亚设计史上已被推崇数十年。

title: Ghost Chair
description: The transparent polycarbonate Ghost Chair is a Nordic space-maximizing trick—it disappears visually into any dining room, making the room feel larger and lighter.

metadata.description_zh: 透明聚碳酸酯幽灵椅是北欧空间最大化妙招，在视觉上消失于任何餐厅，使房间感觉更大更通透。

title: Velvet Dining Chair Set
description: Four matching dining chairs upholstered in plush velvet with solid oak legs—a complete set for a Nordic dining table. Mix-and-match colours are available for a modern eclectic look.

metadata.description_zh: 四把匹配的华丽丝绒实心橡木腿餐椅，是北欧餐桌的完整套装，可搭配不同颜色呈现现代折衷风格。

title: Industrial Pipe Stool
description: The Industrial Pipe Stool's round solid pine seat on black iron pipe legs brings Nordic-industrial character to any kitchen island. Footrest rings at multiple heights suit different users.

metadata.description_zh: 工业管道高凳的圆形实心松木座面立于黑铁管腿上，为任何厨房岛台带来北欧工业个性，多高度脚踏圈适合不同用户。

title: Velvet Counter Stool
description: Velvet seat upholstery on polished gold legs—this counter stool brings Nordic glamour to kitchen islands and breakfast bars. The back support makes long breakfasts more comfortable.

metadata.description_zh: 抛光金色腿上的丝绒座面，这款台面凳为厨房岛台和早餐吧带来北欧魅力，靠背支撑使漫长的早餐更加舒适。

title: Vintage Oak Sideboard
description: The Vintage Oak Sideboard's rattan panel doors bring natural Nordic-boho texture to the dining room. Solid oak frame and adjustable interior shelves combine craft and function.

metadata.description_zh: 复古橡木餐边柜的藤编面板门为餐厅带来天然北欧波西米亚质感，实心橡木框架和可调节内部搁架结合工艺与功能。

title: Concrete Base Dining Table
description: The Concrete Base Dining Table pairs a warm solid oak top with a weighty cast concrete pedestal—a striking Nordic material contrast that grounds the dining room with elemental authority.

metadata.description_zh: 混凝土底座餐桌将温暖的实心橡木桌面与厚重的铸造混凝土底座结合，鲜明的北欧材料对比以元素级权威稳定餐厅。
metadata.material_zh: 橡木桌面，铸造混凝土底座

title: Petite Cafe Table
description: A small Nordic cafe-style round table in solid beech—perfect for morning coffee, breakfast for two, or small apartment dining. Its simple form is endlessly versatile.

metadata.description_zh: 实心山毛榉的小型北欧咖啡厅风格圆桌，非常适合晨间咖啡、两人早餐或小型公寓就餐，简单的造型具有无限的多功能性。

title: Nordic Rattan Chair
description: The Nordic Rattan Chair's woven rattan back panel adds natural texture and lightness to the dining room. Solid oak legs provide a warm, sturdy foundation.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧藤椅的编织藤编背板为餐厅增添天然纹理和轻盈感，实心橡木腿提供温暖坚固的基础。

title: Tub Dining Chair
description: The Tub Dining Chair brings living room comfort to the table—its round, enveloping form in plush velvet turns mealtimes into a luxurious Nordic experience.

metadata.description_zh: 桶形餐椅将客厅舒适带入餐桌，华丽丝绒的圆润包裹形态将进餐时间变为奢华的北欧体验。

title: Dining Set Table & 4 Chairs
description: A complete Nordic dining set—a solid oak table with four matching solid oak chairs, ready to create a beautiful Scandinavian dining space from day one.

metadata.description_zh: 完整的北欧餐桌椅套装，实心橡木桌配四把匹配的实心橡木椅，从第一天起就打造美丽的斯堪的纳维亚就餐空间。

title: High Dining Table Set
description: A Nordic bar-height dining set that transforms kitchen entertaining—solid oak high table with four matching counter stools creates an informal, convivial dining experience.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧吧台高度就餐套装改变厨房娱乐方式，实心橡木高桌配四把匹配台面凳创造随意欢聚的就餐体验。

title: Tulip Style Round Table
description: A Nordic-contemporary take on the iconic pedestal round table—Carrara marble top on a single fluted column base in matte white. Seats four in elegant Scandinavian simplicity.

metadata.description_zh: 对标志性底座圆桌的北欧当代诠释，卡拉拉大理石桌面立于哑光白色单槽柱底座上，以优雅的斯堪的纳维亚简约容纳四人。

title: Nordic Bar Cabinet
description: The Nordic Bar Cabinet showcases a curated spirit collection behind two glass doors on solid oak. Integrated wine rack and adjustable shelves make it a complete home bar solution.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧酒柜在实心橡木的两扇玻璃门后展示精选烈酒收藏，集成酒架和可调节搁板使其成为完整的家庭酒吧解决方案。

title: Butterfly Chair Dining
description: The Butterfly Chair adapted for dining—a leather sling seat on a powder-coated steel frame with a back support that gives Nordic relaxed dining a sculptural edge.

metadata.description_zh: 为就餐改编的蝴蝶椅，粉末涂层钢框架上的皮革悬挂座面配靠背支撑，赋予北欧轻松就餐雕塑感。
metadata.material_zh: 皮革悬挂，粉末涂层框架

title: Counter Height Table
description: The Counter Height Table works at kitchen island height for casual Nordic dining and cooking—solid oak top on four sturdy turned legs.

metadata.description_zh: 台面高度餐桌在厨房岛台高度工作，适合休闲北欧就餐和烹饪，坚固旋制腿上的实心橡木桌面。

title: Arbeid Standing Desk
description: The Arbeid electric standing desk allows effortless height adjustment at the touch of a button—a Nordic wellness investment for modern knowledge workers. Solid oak top completes the premium feel.

metadata.description_zh: 阿贝德电动升降桌允许轻触按钮即可轻松调节高度，是现代知识工作者的北欧健康投资，实心橡木桌面提升高端质感。
metadata.material_zh: 实心橡木桌面，钢制框架

title: Hjern Home Office Desk
description: The Hjern is designed around the realities of working from home—an integrated cable management tray keeps your workspace serene, while a solid oak top provides a warm, productive surface.

metadata.description_zh: 海恩专为居家办公现实需求设计，内置走线盘保持工作空间整洁，实心橡木桌面提供温暖且有效率的工作界面。

title: Slim Secretary Desk
description: The Slim secretary desk folds neatly against the wall when not in use—a space-saving Nordic solution for apartments. The drop-down lid reveals a compact workstation with cubbies and a writing surface.

metadata.description_zh: 修长秘书台不用时紧贴墙壁折叠，是公寓的节省空间北欧方案，翻盖式设计打开后露出带格子收纳和书写面的紧凑工作站。

title: Corner L-Desk
description: The Corner L-Desk maximises office productivity by providing a generous work surface in an efficient L-configuration. Oak veneer brings Nordic warmth to the home office.

metadata.description_zh: L形角落桌以高效的L形配置提供宽阔的工作界面，最大化办公效率，橡木贴皮为家庭办公室带来北欧温暖。

title: Skrive Writing Desk
description: The Skrive is a simple, beautiful writing desk inspired by Scandinavian school furniture. Solid pine and hairpin legs make it light enough to move from room to room.

metadata.description_zh: 斯克里弗是一款受北欧校园家具启发的简约美丽写字台，实心松木与发夹腿使其轻便易于在房间间移动。

title: Rygg Ergonomic Chair
description: The Rygg ergonomic chair supports Nordic working culture values—health, comfort, and longevity. Its breathable mesh back and adjustable lumbar support reduce fatigue during long working sessions.

metadata.description_zh: 里格人体工学椅支持北欧工作文化价值观——健康、舒适与持久，透气网背和可调节腰部支撑减少长时间工作的疲劳。

title: Stol Office Chair
description: The Stol blends Nordic aesthetics with office functionality—a handsome fabric-upholstered chair with a 5-star chrome base and adjustable seat height. Both stylish and supportive.

metadata.description_zh: 斯托尔融合北欧美学与办公功能，布面坐面配五爪镀铬底座和可调节座高，既美观又有支撑性。

title: Barn Task Chair
description: The Barn task chair is an affordable entry into Nordic ergonomic design. Its breathable mesh seat and adjustable armrests support a healthy posture through a full working day.

metadata.description_zh: 巴恩任务椅是实惠的北欧人体工学设计入门款，透气网座和可调节扶手为全天工作提供健康姿势支撑。

title: Akt Filing Cabinet
description: The Akt filing cabinet stores A4 and letter-size documents in two lockable drawers. Its powder-coated steel construction and casters make it a mobile Nordic home office companion.

metadata.description_zh: 阿克特文件柜在两个可锁抽屉中存放A4和信函尺寸文件，粉末涂层钢构造和脚轮使其成为移动的北欧家庭办公伴侣。

title: Vy Monitor Stand
description: The Vy monitor stand raises your screen to an ergonomic eye level while providing a neat drawer below for stationery. Solid bamboo construction is both sustainable and beautiful.

metadata.description_zh: 维伊显示器支架将屏幕抬升至人体工学视线高度，下方整洁的抽屉存放文具。实心竹构造既可持续又美观。

title: Sokkel Bookcase
description: The Sokkel office bookcase provides accessible storage for reference books, files, and desk accessories. Adjustable pine shelves adapt to items of varying heights.

metadata.description_zh: 索科尔办公书架为参考书、文件和桌面配件提供易取的储物空间，可调节松木搁板适应不同高度的物品。

title: Lyse Desk Lamp
description: The Lyse desk lamp provides focused Nordic light for reading and working. Its adjustable arm and 360° rotating head adapt to any task, while LED bulb technology ensures efficiency.

metadata.description_zh: 吕色台灯为阅读和工作提供专注的北欧照明，可调节臂和360°旋转灯头适应任何任务，LED灯泡技术确保节能。

title: Bord Reading Lamp
description: The Bord reading lamp pairs a solid brass stem with a hand-stitched fabric shade for warm, diffuse Nordic light. An elegant companion for a writing desk or bedside table.

metadata.description_zh: 博德阅读台灯以实心黄铜杆配手缝布艺灯罩，提供温暖柔和的北欧照明，是书桌或床头桌的优雅伴侣。

title: Wall-Mounted Fold Desk
description: The Wall-Mounted Fold Desk folds flat against the wall when not in use—disappearing entirely from sight. Ideal for Nordic apartments where every square metre counts.

metadata.description_zh: 壁挂折叠桌不用时平折靠墙，完全从视野消失，非常适合每平方米都重要的北欧公寓。

title: Concrete Look Desk
description: The Concrete Look Desk brings Nordic-industrial aesthetics to the home office. Its concrete-effect laminate top on a sturdy steel frame creates a serious, focused workspace.

metadata.description_zh: 混凝土感桌为家庭办公室带来北欧工业美学，坚固钢框架上的混凝土效果贴面桌面创造严肃专注的工作空间。

title: Designer Writing Desk
description: The Designer Writing Desk is an artisan piece for those who take their workspace as seriously as their living space. Solid walnut on polished brass legs—Nordic luxury for the home office.

metadata.description_zh: 设计师写字桌是为那些像对待生活空间一样认真对待工作空间的人准备的工匠作品，抛光黄铜腿上的实心胡桃木，是家庭办公室的北欧奢华。

title: Dual Monitor Desk
description: The Dual Monitor Desk is purpose-built for the modern Nordic home office with dual screens—a wide surface, integrated cable management, and a monitor platform built into the rear panel.

metadata.description_zh: 双显示器桌专为现代北欧家庭办公室的双屏设置而建，宽阔的桌面、集成走线管理和内置于后面板的显示器平台。

title: Bamboo Standing Desk
description: A sustainable Nordic standing desk in solid bamboo—one of the fastest-growing renewable materials. Electric height adjustment from sitting to standing with a quiet dual motor.

metadata.description_zh: 可持续的实心竹北欧升降桌，竹子是生长最快的可再生材料之一，安静的双电机实现从坐姿到站姿的电动高度调节。

title: Mesh Premium Chair
description: The Mesh Premium is the Nordic ergonomic chair for those who spend 8+ hours at a desk. Full-body mesh support, 4D armrests, and a lumbar system that adjusts to your exact spine.

metadata.description_zh: 高级网椅是为每天在桌旁度过8小时以上的人准备的北欧人体工学椅，全身网状支撑、4D扶手和精确适应脊柱的腰部系统。

title: Saddle Stool
description: The Saddle Stool promotes an active sitting posture that engages core muscles—a Scandinavian health approach to desk work. The tilted saddle seat reduces lower back pressure by up to 30%.

metadata.description_zh: 马鞍凳提倡激活核心肌群的积极坐姿，是北欧对桌面工作的健康态度，倾斜的马鞍座可将腰部压力减少多达30%。

title: Kneeling Chair
description: The Kneeling Chair redistributes weight between buttocks and knees to promote an open hip angle and naturally upright spine—a traditional Scandinavian ergonomic solution.

metadata.description_zh: 跪姿椅将重量重新分配于臀部和膝盖之间，以促进开放的髋关节角度和自然直立的脊柱，是传统的斯堪的纳维亚人体工学解决方案。

title: Oak Pedestal Cabinet
description: The Oak Pedestal Cabinet rolls under a desk on casters and provides three lockable drawers for important documents. Its solid oak construction keeps it beautiful on the desktop surface too.

metadata.description_zh: 橡木底柜在脚轮上滑入桌下，提供三个可锁抽屉存放重要文件，实心橡木构造使其在桌面上同样美观。

title: Floating Monitor Arm
description: The Floating Monitor Arm clamps to any desk and allows full articulation of your screen—height, tilt, and rotation—freeing up valuable Nordic desk space.

metadata.description_zh: 悬浮显示器臂夹在任何桌子上，允许屏幕的完整铰接——高度、倾斜和旋转，释放宝贵的北欧桌面空间。

title: Walnut Office Bookcase
description: The Walnut Office Bookcase with glass doors is a premium home office statement piece. Walnut veneer and brushed brass handles create a Nordic executive aesthetic.

metadata.description_zh: 胡桃木办公书架配玻璃门是高级家庭办公室的宣言单品，胡桃木贴皮与拉丝黄铜拉手创造北欧行政美学。

title: Adjustable Height Desk
description: The Adjustable Height Desk uses a smooth hand-crank mechanism for height adjustment from sitting to standing—no electricity required. Walnut veneer top with cable management grommets.

metadata.description_zh: 可调高度桌使用顺滑手摇机构从坐姿调节至站姿，无需电力，胡桃木贴皮桌面配走线孔。

title: Kids Study Desk
description: A simple, solid pine study desk designed for Nordic children—robust enough for homework, art projects, and years of after-school use. A drawer keeps stationery organised.

metadata.description_zh: 简单的实心松木学习桌专为北欧儿童设计，坚固耐用，适合家庭作业、艺术项目和多年课后使用，抽屉整理文具。

title: Executive Leather Desk
description: The Executive Leather Desk is a Nordic power piece—a wide solid oak frame with a hand-stitched leather writing inlay and integrated cable management for a tidy, professional surface.

metadata.description_zh: 行政皮革桌是北欧权威单品，宽阔实心橡木框架配手缝皮革书写嵌板和集成走线管理，打造整洁专业的桌面。

title: Leather Executive Chair
description: The Leather Executive Chair brings Nordic boardroom confidence to the home office. Full genuine leather upholstery and a 5-star chrome base signal quality and craftsmanship.

metadata.description_zh: 皮革行政椅将北欧董事会室的自信带入家庭办公室，全真皮面料和五爪镀铬底座彰显品质和工艺。

title: Active Sitting Stool
description: The Active Sitting Stool encourages micro-movements while working—its wobble base engages core muscles and promotes blood circulation for healthier Nordic desk work.

metadata.description_zh: 主动坐姿凳在工作时鼓励微动作，晃动底座激活核心肌群并促进血液循环，使北欧桌面工作更健康。

title: Gaming Chair Nordic
description: The Gaming Chair Nordic combines race-car inspired ergonomics with Scandinavian colour restraint—black and grey PU leather with adjustable lumbar and neck pillows for marathon sessions.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧电竞椅结合赛车灵感人体工学与斯堪的纳维亚色彩克制，黑灰PU皮革配可调节腰部和颈部枕头，适合马拉松式游戏。

title: Clamp Desk Lamp
description: The Clamp Desk Lamp attaches to any desk edge and frees up the surface below. Its flexible arm and 360° rotating head position Nordic task light precisely where needed.

metadata.description_zh: 夹持台灯附着于任何桌子边缘，释放下方桌面，可弯曲臂和360°旋转灯头将北欧任务照明精准定位到所需位置。

title: Corner Standing Desk
description: The Corner Standing Desk is the ultimate Nordic home office setup—a large L-shaped work surface with dual motor height adjustment that transitions from sitting to standing with precision.

metadata.description_zh: 转角升降桌是终极北欧家庭办公设置，大型L形工作面配双电机精准高度调节，从坐姿转换至站姿。

title: Floating Shelf Desk
description: The Floating Shelf Desk is the most space-efficient Nordic work solution—a wall-mounted solid oak shelf at standing or sitting desk height creates a minimal workspace anywhere.

metadata.description_zh: 悬浮搁板桌是最节省空间的北欧工作解决方案，站立或坐姿高度的壁挂实心橡木搁板在任何地方创造极简工作空间。

title: Posture Chair
description: The Posture Chair features a forward-tilting seat and a supportive backrest angle calibrated for Nordic workers who spend long hours at a desk—reducing lower back strain by design.

metadata.description_zh: 姿势椅具有前倾坐面和支撑性靠背角度，专为在桌旁长时间工作的北欧人员设计，通过设计减少腰部劳损。

title: Bookshelf Desk Combo
description: The Bookshelf Desk Combo integrates a full-height bookshelf with a writing desk in a single compact Nordic unit—ideal for home offices that need to maximise every square metre.

metadata.description_zh: 书架桌组合将全高书架与写字桌整合于单一紧凑的北欧单元中，非常适合需要最大化每平方米的家庭办公室。

title: Wireless Charging Desk Pad
description: The Wireless Charging Desk Pad is a Nordic smart-desk essential—a large vegan leather mat with an integrated wireless charging zone keeps the desk tidy and your devices powered.

metadata.description_zh: 无线充电桌垫是北欧智能桌面必备，集成无线充电区的大型素皮垫保持桌面整洁，同时为设备充电。

title: Foldable Laptop Stand
description: The Foldable Laptop Stand is a Nordic home office essential—lightweight aluminium folds flat for travel and elevates any laptop to an ergonomic viewing angle to reduce neck strain.

metadata.description_zh: 折叠笔记本支架是北欧家庭办公必备，轻量铝合金可平折旅行，将任何笔记本提升至人体工学观看角度以减少颈部劳损。

title: Task Chair Minimalist
description: The Minimalist Task Chair delivers essential ergonomic support in a clean Nordic form—breathable mesh back and a comfortable fabric seat without complex adjustment mechanisms.

metadata.description_zh: 极简任务椅以干净的北欧形态提供基本的人体工学支撑，透气网背和舒适的面料座面，没有复杂的调节机构。

title: Desk Organiser Set
description: Five coordinated solid oak desk accessories—pencil cup, phone stand, card holder, tray, and cable organiser—that bring Nordic order and warmth to any work surface.

metadata.description_zh: 五件协调的实心橡木桌面配件，铅笔杯、手机支架、名片架、托盘和走线整理，为任何工作面带来北欧秩序和温暖。
metadata.material_zh: 实心橡木整理套装，五件

specs.Includes: Pencil cup, phone stand, card holder, tray, cable organiser

title: Sit-Stand Converter
description: The Sit-Stand Converter sits on any existing desk and converts it into a standing desk—a cost-effective Nordic ergonomic upgrade that lifts the monitor and keyboard together.

metadata.description_zh: 坐站转换器放置于任何现有桌子上，将其转换为升降桌，是一种将显示器和键盘一起抬升的经济实惠的北欧人体工学升级。

title: Cable Management Box
description: The Bamboo Cable Management Box hides power strips and tangled cables in a clean Nordic bamboo enclosure—transforming a messy desk into a serene Scandinavian workspace.

metadata.description_zh: 竹制走线管理盒将电源板和缠绕电缆隐藏在干净的北欧竹制围栏中，将杂乱的桌面转变为宁静的斯堪的纳维亚工作空间。

title: Freja Pendant Light
description: The Freja pendant is a Nordic lighting icon—its hemispherical shade diffuses light evenly across the dining table or kitchen island. Available in soft matte colours inspired by Scandinavian nature.

metadata.description_zh: 弗蕾雅吊灯是北欧照明图标，半球形灯罩将光线均匀散布于餐桌或厨房岛台，提供受斯堪的纳维亚自然启发的柔和哑光色彩。

title: Takke Cluster Pendant
description: The Takke cluster pendant creates a striking Nordic constellation of glass globes suspended on a brass frame. The warm glow through the hand-blown glass creates an intimate dining atmosphere.

metadata.description_zh: 塔克簇状吊灯以悬挂在黄铜框架上的玻璃球创造令人印象深刻的北欧星座，手吹玻璃透过的温暖光芒营造亲密的就餐氛围。

title: Krone Rattan Pendant
description: The Krone rattan pendant brings natural Nordic-boho texture overhead. Hand-woven rattan creates dappled light patterns across ceilings and walls, adding warmth to any room.

metadata.description_zh: 克罗内藤编吊灯在头顶带来天然的北欧波西米亚质感，手工藤编在天花板和墙壁上创造斑驳的光影，为任何房间增添温暖。

title: Arc Ceiling Light
description: The Arc ceiling pendant's textured steel shade creates interesting shadow patterns when lit, bringing sculptural interest to the Nordic room above.

metadata.description_zh: 弧线吸顶灯的纹理钢制灯罩在点亮时创造有趣的阴影图案，为北欧房间带来雕塑感。

title: Nordic Cone Pendant
