description: A minimalist cone silhouette executed in powder-coated steel—the Scandinavian design principle of maximum effect from minimum form. Perfect above a kitchen table or bedside.

metadata.description_zh: 以粉末涂层钢制成的极简锥形轮廓，体现斯堪的纳维亚设计原则——以最少的形式达到最大的效果，非常适合餐桌或床头上方。

title: Birch Bulb Pendant
description: The simplest Nordic lighting statement—a clear glass globe pendant showcasing a warm Edison filament bulb. Often grouped in multiples for dramatic effect over a dining table.

metadata.description_zh: 最简洁的北欧照明表达，透明玻璃球吊灯展示温暖的爱迪生丝灯泡，常多组合用于餐桌上方营造戏剧效果。

title: Drum Linen Pendant
description: The Drum pendant's linen shade diffuses warm ambient light with a gentle Nordic quality. The solid oak ring adds natural warmth that elevates it above a purely utilitarian light.

metadata.description_zh: 鼓形吊灯的亚麻灯罩以温柔的北欧质感散发温暖的氛围光，实心橡木环增添自然温暖，使其超越单纯实用的照明。

title: Funnel Black Pendant
description: The Funnel pendant is a minimal Scandinavian directional light that focuses illumination onto a dining table or work surface below. Matte black finish offers striking contrast.

metadata.description_zh: 漏斗型吊灯是极简的北欧定向灯，将照明集中于下方的餐桌或工作面，哑光黑色表面提供鲜明的对比。

title: Lykt Arc Floor Lamp
description: The Lykt arc floor lamp extends a gentle arc over a reading chair or sofa, positioning warm Nordic light exactly where it is needed. A marble base ensures stability without taking up extra floor space.

metadata.description_zh: 吕克特弧形落地灯在阅读椅或沙发上方延伸出柔和的弧度，将温暖的北欧光线精准投射到所需位置，大理石底座确保稳定性而不占用额外地面空间。

title: Stav Tripod Floor Lamp
description: The Stav tripod floor lamp is a Nordic living room staple—solid oak legs and a natural linen shade combine the organic warmth of Scandinavian craft with practical ambient lighting.

metadata.description_zh: 斯塔夫三脚落地灯是北欧客厅的基础单品，实心橡木腿与天然亚麻灯罩将斯堪的纳维亚工艺的有机温暖与实用的氛围照明相结合。
metadata.material_zh: 实心橡木三脚架，亚麻灯罩

title: Bue Reading Lamp
description: The Bue adjustable floor lamp is designed for focused Nordic reading light. Its long adjustable arm positions the light precisely, while the weighted base keeps everything stable.

metadata.description_zh: 布埃可调节落地灯专为专注的北欧阅读照明设计，长可调节臂精准定位灯光，加重底座确保稳定。

title: Pære Table Lamp
description: The Pære table lamp combines a hand-thrown ceramic base in a muted Nordic glaze with a classic linen drum shade. The result is a warm, characterful light source for any Nordic bedside or shelf.

metadata.description_zh: 帕勒台灯将手工拉坯的北欧哑光陶瓷底座与经典亚麻鼓形灯罩结合，是北欧床头或搁架上温暖个性的光源。

title: Globe Table Lamp
description: The Globe table lamp's simple opal glass sphere provides 360° warm light in any direction, making it perfect as a bedside or accent lamp in Scandinavian interiors.

metadata.description_zh: 球形台灯简单的乳白玻璃球向360°方向提供温暖光线，非常适合作为北欧室内的床头或装饰台灯。

title: Bue Wall Sconce
description: The Bue wall sconce brings warm Nordic atmosphere to a bedroom or hallway. Its brushed brass arm and clear glass shade cast a soft, inviting glow.

metadata.description_zh: 布埃壁灯为卧室或走廊带来温暖的北欧氛围，拉丝黄铜臂与透明玻璃灯罩散发柔和迷人的光芒。

title: Stjerne Chandelier
description: The Stjerne chandelier is a statement piece inspired by Nordic star formations. Six curving brass arms each hold a small Edison bulb, creating a warm constellation above dining tables.

metadata.description_zh: 斯蒂尔内枝形吊灯是受北欧星座启发的宣言单品，六根弯曲黄铜臂各持一个小爱迪生灯泡，在餐桌上方创造温暖的星座。

title: Lys Candleholder
description: The Lys candleholder is a Nordic lighting essential—pure solid brass shaped into a minimal taper candle holder. Group multiples together for the signature Scandinavian hygge effect.

metadata.description_zh: 吕斯烛台是北欧照明必备，纯实心黄铜塑造极简的柱形烛台。多个组合在一起呈现标志性的北欧hygge效果。

title: Julaften Candle Lantern
description: The Julaften lantern brings the warm Nordic tradition of candlelight indoors and out. Its sturdy steel frame and clear glass panels shield the flame from draughts while casting gentle light.

metadata.description_zh: 圣诞前夜提灯将北欧烛光的温暖传统带入室内外，坚固的钢框架和透明玻璃板遮挡气流，同时散发温柔的光芒。

title: Stjerne Fairy Lights
description: Stjerne's warm-white copper wire fairy lights are a Nordic decorating essential. The 100 micro-LEDs on flexible copper wire shape easily around headboards, shelves, and windows.

metadata.description_zh: 斯蒂尔内铜线串灯是北欧装饰必备，100个暖白微型LED灯珠在柔性铜线上可轻松塑形环绕床头板、搁架和窗户。

title: Woven Seagrass Pendant
description: This hand-woven seagrass pendant brings earthy Nordic-coastal character overhead. Each one is unique due to the natural variation in hand-weaving.

metadata.description_zh: 这款手工编织海草吊灯在头顶带来朴实的北欧海滨个性，每件作品因手工编织的天然变化而独一无二。

title: Metal Mesh Pendant
description: Fine woven steel mesh creates a delicate pattern of light and shadow—a Nordic industrial-minimal statement that suits kitchens, dining rooms, and hallways.

metadata.description_zh: 细腻的编织钢网创造精致的光影图案，适合厨房、餐厅和走廊的北欧工业极简宣言。

title: Schoolhouse Globe Pendant
description: A Nordic interpretation of the classic schoolhouse pendant—opal glass globe with a brass ceiling fitting that adds a warm vintage touch to Scandinavian interiors.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧对经典学校球形吊灯的诠释，乳白玻璃球配黄铜吊顶配件，为斯堪的纳维亚室内增添温暖的复古触感。

title: Rectangle Bar Pendant
description: The Rectangle Bar Pendant is ideal above a long dining table—three Edison bulbs on a linear track provide even illumination across the full table length in classic Nordic fashion.

metadata.description_zh: 矩形条形吊灯非常适合长餐桌上方，线性轨道上的三个爱迪生灯泡以经典北欧方式为整个桌面长度提供均匀照明。

title: Bamboo Pendant Light
description: The Bamboo Pendant's hand-woven bamboo shell creates dappled, warm shadows that transform a plain ceiling into a Nordic natural canopy. Sustainably sourced bamboo only.

metadata.description_zh: 竹制吊灯的手工编织竹外壳创造斑驳的温暖阴影，将普通天花板变成北欧自然华盖，仅使用可持续采购的竹材。

title: Boom Floor Lamp
description: The Boom floor lamp's long adjustable arm positions bright Nordic task lighting exactly where needed—over a reading chair, dining table, or work surface with effortless precision.

metadata.description_zh: 悬臂落地灯的长可调节臂将明亮的北欧任务照明精准定位到需要的地方，在阅读椅、餐桌或工作面上轻松精准。

title: Slim LED Floor Lamp
description: A modern Nordic take on the floor lamp—slim aluminium profile with integrated LED strip that provides soft, glare-free upward light for ambient Nordic atmosphere.

metadata.description_zh: 落地灯的现代北欧诠释，纤薄铝合金轮廓配集成LED灯带提供柔和无眩光的向上光线，营造北欧氛围。

title: Rattan Globe Floor Lamp
description: A Nordic-boho statement floor lamp—the oversized woven rattan globe creates dramatic patterned shadows while the solid wood base provides stable grounding.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧波西米亚宣言落地灯，超大编织藤编球创造戏剧性的图案阴影，实木底座提供稳定的基础。

title: Marble Table Lamp
description: Natural marble base in Nordic white or black and a linen shade—a refined material pairing that adds quiet luxury to any Scandinavian bedside or shelf.

metadata.description_zh: 天然大理石底座在北欧白色或黑色与亚麻灯罩中，是一种精致的材料搭配，为任何斯堪的纳维亚床头或搁架增添低调奢华。

title: Concrete Table Lamp
description: The Concrete Table Lamp brings Nordic industrial texture to the bedside or desk. Each hand-cast concrete base has its own unique surface texture from the casting process.

metadata.description_zh: 混凝土台灯为床头或书桌带来北欧工业质感，每个手工铸造的混凝土底座都有来自铸造过程的独特表面纹理。
metadata.material_zh: 铸造混凝土底座，布艺灯罩

title: Touch Dimmer Lamp
description: The Touch Dimmer Lamp adjusts through four brightness levels with a tap of the base—perfect for Nordic evenings where you progress from reading brightness to bedtime glow.

metadata.description_zh: 触控调光台灯通过轻触底座在四个亮度等级间调节，非常适合从阅读亮度到就寝夜光的北欧夜晚渐进过渡。

title: Black Iron Sconce
description: The Black Iron Sconce is a Scandinavian-industrial essential—a minimal folded iron arm holds an exposed Edison bulb for warm, characterful light against any Nordic wall.

metadata.description_zh: 黑铁壁灯是斯堪的纳维亚工业必备，极简折叠铁臂托举裸露的爱迪生灯泡，在任何北欧墙壁上投射温暖个性的光芒。

title: Swing Arm Sconce
description: The Swing Arm Sconce brings Nordic bedside reading functionality to the wall—its adjustable arm positions the light precisely while keeping the bedside table clear.

metadata.description_zh: 摇臂壁灯将北欧床头阅读功能引入墙壁，可调节臂精准定位灯光，同时保持床头桌面整洁。

title: Sputnik Chandelier
description: The Sputnik chandelier is a mid-century Nordic statement—12 brass arms radiate outward like a Nordic star in every direction, each ending in a frosted glass globe.

metadata.description_zh: 斯普特尼克吊灯是中世纪北欧宣言，12根黄铜臂向各方向放射如北欧星辰，每根末端是一个磨砂玻璃球。

title: Terrazzo Candleholder
description: A Nordic dining table essential—the Terrazzo candleholder is cast from colourful terrazzo aggregate in soft pastel tones that complement any Scandinavian table setting.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧餐桌必备，水磨石烛台以柔和粉彩色调的彩色水磨石骨料铸造，与任何斯堪的纳维亚餐桌摆设相配。

title: Outdoor String Lights
description: Nordic summer evenings deserve the warm glow of outdoor string lights. These weatherproof Edison-style bulbs on a heavy-duty cable create a magical Nordic garden atmosphere.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧夏日傍晚值得户外串灯的温暖光晕，防水爱迪生风格灯泡在重型电缆上创造神奇的北欧花园氛围。

title: Smoke Glass Pendant
description: Smoked glass and polished brass—a Nordic art deco-inspired pendant that casts warm, amber-tinted light through its darkened globe for intimate dining atmosphere.

metadata.description_zh: 烟灰玻璃与抛光黄铜，受北欧装饰艺术启发的吊灯，通过深色球体投射温暖的琥珀色光芒，营造亲密的就餐氛围。

title: Industrial Cage Pendant
description: The Industrial Cage Pendant is a Nordic kitchen and dining essential—a black steel wire cage that exposes an Edison filament bulb for warm, textured industrial light.

metadata.description_zh: 工业笼形吊灯是北欧厨房和餐厅的必备，黑色钢丝笼展露爱迪生丝灯泡，发出温暖有质感的工业光芒。

title: Nordic Star Pendant
description: Inspired by traditional Nordic Christmas star lanterns, this metal star pendant casts beautiful star-patterned shadows across walls and ceilings year-round.

metadata.description_zh: 受北欧传统圣诞星形灯笼启发，这款金属星形吊灯全年在墙壁和天花板上投射美丽的星形图案阴影。

title: Designer Floor Lamp
description: The Designer Floor Lamp is a Nordic luxury statement piece—natural marble base, solid brass stem, and a hand-stitched linen shade for warm directional light.

metadata.description_zh: 设计师落地灯是北欧奢华宣言单品，天然大理石底座、实心黄铜杆和手缝亚麻灯罩提供温暖的定向光。

title: Pharmacy Floor Lamp
description: The classic Nordic pharmacy lamp updated with a heavy marble base for stability. Its fully adjustable head and arm position bright task light wherever it is needed.

metadata.description_zh: 经典北欧药房灯以重质大理石底座更新提升稳定性，完全可调节的灯头和灯臂将明亮的任务光定位到任何需要的地方。

title: Wabi-Sabi Lamp
description: The Wabi-Sabi Lamp celebrates the Nordic-Japanese philosophy of finding beauty in imperfection—its hand-thrown ceramic base has intentional irregularities and a flowing reactive glaze.

metadata.description_zh: 侘寂台灯颂扬北欧日式哲学——在不完美中发现美，手工拉坯陶瓷底座有意为之的不规则性与流动的反应釉。

title: Kids Night Lamp
description: A soft silicone Nordic night lamp for children's rooms—squeeze it to turn on, squeeze again to cycle through warm dimness levels. USB rechargeable, no cables needed at bedtime.

metadata.description_zh: 儿童房柔软硅胶北欧夜灯，挤压开启，再次挤压循环暖色亮度等级，USB充电，就寝时无需电缆。

title: Arc Table Lamp
description: The Arc Table Lamp's elegant bent brass stem positions the shade at a natural reading angle—designed for bedside tables where Nordic clarity and warmth are most needed.

metadata.description_zh: 弧形台灯优雅弯曲的黄铜杆将灯罩定位于自然的阅读角度，专为最需要北欧清晰与温暖的床头桌设计。

title: Rattan Wall Sconce
description: The Rattan Wall Sconce combines natural Nordic-boho texture with the warmth of brass hardware—a bathroom or bedroom wall light that creates beautiful dappled light patterns.

metadata.description_zh: 藤编壁灯将天然北欧波西米亚质感与黄铜五金的温暖结合，是浴室或卧室壁灯，创造美丽的斑驳光影图案。

title: Dome Wall Sconce
description: A Scandinavian half-dome sconce that directs light both up and down the wall for dramatic Nordic ambient lighting. Powder-coated aluminum in crisp white or matte black.

metadata.description_zh: 斯堪的纳维亚半球壁灯将光线向上和向下投射于墙壁，营造戏剧性的北欧环境照明，亮白或哑光黑色粉末涂层铝。

title: Linen Drum Chandelier
description: The Linen Drum Chandelier provides soft, diffused Nordic ambience over a dining table or in a living room. The wide linen shade creates an even wash of warm light.

metadata.description_zh: 亚麻鼓形吊灯在餐桌上方或客厅中提供柔和、漫射的北欧氛围，宽大的亚麻灯罩创造均匀的暖光光晕。

title: Curtain Light
description: A Nordic window light curtain—300 warm white micro-LEDs on a 3×1m net create a cosy Nordic atmosphere reminiscent of softly lit Scandinavian evenings.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧窗帘灯，3×1米网格上的300个暖白微型LED创造温馨的北欧氛围，令人联想到柔光的斯堪的纳维亚夜晚。

title: Geo Pendant Light
description: The Geo pendant's faceted geometric form catches light from multiple angles, creating a Nordic light sculpture that is as beautiful unlit as lit. Brushed gold finish.

metadata.description_zh: 几何吊灯的切面几何形态从多个角度捕捉光线，创造北欧光雕塑，不亮时与点亮时同样美丽，拉丝金色表面。

title: Paper Pendant Light
description: The Paper Pendant's rice paper diffuses light into a warm, glowing sphere—a Nordic-Japanese lantern aesthetic that brings zen calm to any room.

metadata.description_zh: 纸质吊灯的宣纸将光线散漫为温暖发光的球体，北欧日式灯笼美学为任何房间带来禅意平静。

title: Nordlux Style Wall Light
description: This wall sconce pairs a polished chrome arm with a frosted opal glass globe—a Nordic interpretation of the classic wall globe light that suits both modern and traditional interiors.

metadata.description_zh: 这款壁灯将抛光镀铬臂与磨砂乳白玻璃球搭配，是适合现代和传统室内的经典墙面球灯的北欧诠释。

title: Track Lighting System
description: The Nordic Track Lighting System is flexible modern lighting—a 1-metre ceiling track with three adjustable spotlights that each rotate individually to highlight artwork, dining tables, or kitchen work zones.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧轨道照明系统是灵活的现代照明，1米天花板轨道配三个可单独旋转的可调节聚光灯，照亮艺术品、餐桌或厨房工作区。
metadata.material_zh: 可调节轨道，三个聚光灯

title: Nordic LED Bulb Set
description: A set of four warm 2700K LED bulbs in classic Nordic candelabra shapes—long-lasting, low energy, and designed to complement Scandinavian pendant and table lamp designs.

metadata.description_zh: 四件套2700K暖白LED灯泡，经典北欧烛台形状，长寿命、低能耗，设计为搭配斯堪的纳维亚吊灯和台灯。

title: Hexagon Wall Light
description: The Hexagon Wall Light is a Nordic geometric statement—a brass-framed hexagonal form with a frosted glass insert that produces warm, patterned light across the wall.

metadata.description_zh: 六边形壁灯是北欧几何宣言，黄铜框架六边形与磨砂玻璃嵌件在墙面上产生温暖的图案光芒。

title: Cone Pendant Cluster
description: Five slender cones of different lengths cluster on a single ceiling canopy—the Cone Cluster pendant creates a Nordic sculptural lighting moment above any dining or living space.

metadata.description_zh: 五个不同长度的纤细锥形汇聚于单个天花板底座，锥形簇状吊灯在任何就餐或起居空间上方创造北欧雕塑照明时刻。

title: Nordic Wall Lantern
description: The Nordic Wall Lantern brings traditional Scandinavian lantern warmth to exterior walls, entrances, and hallways. Black powder-coated steel and clear glass panels are weatherproof rated.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧壁灯笼将传统斯堪的纳维亚灯笼温暖带入外墙、入口和走廊，黑色粉末涂层钢和透明玻璃板达到防水等级。

title: Ceramic Lamp Base
description: A hand-thrown Nordic ceramic lamp base sold without shade—pair it with your choice of linen, paper, or rattan shade to create a bespoke Nordic table lamp.

metadata.description_zh: 手工拉坯北欧陶瓷灯底座不含灯罩出售，与您选择的亚麻、纸质或藤编灯罩搭配，创造定制的北欧台灯。

title: Blomst Ceramic Vase
description: The Blomst vase is hand-thrown by Scandinavian potters from fine stoneware clay and glazed in muted Nordic tones. Each piece is unique with its own subtle variations in form and glaze.

metadata.description_zh: 布隆斯特花瓶由北欧陶艺师以细腻炻器黏土手工拉坯，施以北欧哑光釉色，每件作品都有独特微妙的形态与釉色变化。

title: Nordic Glass Vase
description: This hand-blown glass vase captures the clarity and lightness of Scandinavian design. Its simple silhouette looks beautiful with a single stem or a wild meadow bouquet.

metadata.description_zh: 这款手吹玻璃花瓶捕捉斯堪的纳维亚设计的通透与轻盈，简单的轮廓无论配单支花茎还是野花束都美不胜收。

title: Birch Bud Vase Set
description: A set of three minimalist bud vases in Nordic white ceramic—perfect for displaying individual stems on a shelf or dining table. Their varied heights create a natural grouping.

metadata.description_zh: 三件极简北欧白色陶瓷小口花瓶套装，非常适合在搁架或餐桌上展示单支花茎，高低各异的高度自然成组。

title: Hygge Knit Cushion
description: The Hygge knit cushion adds instant Nordic warmth to any sofa or armchair. Its chunky cotton knit cover has a satisfying tactile quality, and the removable cover is machine washable.

metadata.description_zh: 海格针织抱枕为任何沙发或扶手椅立即增添北欧温暖，粗棉针织套触感令人满足，可拆卸套可机洗。

title: Flock Linen Cushion
description: Flock's washed linen cushion cover has the beautifully relaxed texture that defines Nordic casual living. The inner feather pad ensures lasting plumpness.

metadata.description_zh: 弗洛克水洗亚麻抱枕套具有定义北欧休闲生活的美丽放松质感，内置羽毛垫确保持久丰盈。

title: Embroidered Folk Cushion
description: This cushion celebrates Nordic folk embroidery traditions with hand-stitched floral motifs on natural cotton. Each piece is a small work of art that tells a Nordic story.

metadata.description_zh: 这款抱枕以天然棉上的手工花卉刺绣颂扬北欧民俗刺绣传统，每件作品都是讲述北欧故事的小型艺术品。

title: Ull Wool Throw
description: The Ull merino wool throw is the definitive Nordic comfort accessory—lightweight yet incredibly warm, it wraps around shoulders for reading or drapes over a sofa arm with effortless style.

metadata.description_zh: 乌勒美利奴羊毛毯是北欧舒适配件的终极代表，轻盈却温暖，可绕肩阅读或轻松搭在沙发扶手上。

title: Strik Chunky Knit Blanket
description: The Strik chunky knit blanket is a Scandinavian cosy-season staple—its oversized stitches create an airy yet warming layer perfect for sofa evenings in the Nordic darkness.

metadata.description_zh: 斯特里克粗织毯是斯堪的纳维亚舒适季节的必备单品，超大针脚创造通透却保暖的层次，非常适合北欧黑暗中的沙发夜晚。

title: Jord Wool Rug
description: The Jord rug is hand-woven using traditional Scandinavian flat-weave techniques in natural undyed wool. Its subtle texture and neutral tones ground any Nordic room with organic warmth.

metadata.description_zh: 约德地毯采用传统斯堪的纳维亚平纹编织技术以天然未染色羊毛手工编织，细腻的纹理和中性色调以有机温暖稳定任何北欧房间。

title: Mönster Geometric Rug
description: Mönster's bold geometric pattern is inspired by traditional Nordic textile arts. The cotton construction is durable and easy to clean, making it ideal for high-traffic areas.

metadata.description_zh: 芒斯特的大胆几何图案灵感源于北欧传统纺织艺术，棉质构造耐用且易于清洗，非常适合高通行区域。

title: Silke Shaggy Rug
description: The Silke shaggy rug brings Nordic underfoot luxury to any room. Its thick high-pile polyester creates an irresistibly soft surface that invites bare feet.

metadata.description_zh: 希尔科长绒地毯为任何房间带来北欧脚感奢华，厚实的高绒聚酯创造出令人难以抗拒的柔软表面，邀请赤足踩踏。

title: Print Nord Art Print
description: Original Scandinavian-inspired artwork reproduced as a high-quality giclée print on 200 gsm fine art paper. Ships unframed, ready to be paired with a simple Nordic frame.

metadata.material: Giclée print on fine art paper
metadata.description_zh: 北欧风格原创艺术作品以高质量喷墨印刷方式印刷在200克重艺术纸上，不带框发货，可搭配简约北欧相框。

specs.Material: Giclée print on fine art paper

title: Tid Wall Clock
description: The Tid wall clock celebrates Scandinavian typographic design with clean numerals on a solid oak face and a silent quartz movement that won't disturb Nordic nights.

metadata.description_zh: 提德挂钟以干净数字印于实心橡木表盘上颂扬斯堪的纳维亚字体设计，静音石英机芯不会打扰北欧之夜。

title: Voks Scented Candle
description: Hand-poured soy wax candle scented with Nordic forest notes of pine, birch, and earth. The natural soy wax burns cleanly and lasts approximately 50 hours.

metadata.description_zh: 手工浇注大豆蜡烛，带有松木、桦树和泥土的北欧森林香调，天然大豆蜡燃烧纯净，可持续约50小时。

title: Ramme Oak Frame
description: The Ramme photo frame embodies Nordic simplicity—solid oak with a minimal moulding profile and UV-protective glass. Available in multiple sizes for building a Nordic gallery wall.

metadata.description_zh: 拉梅相框体现北欧简约，实心橡木配极简线脚轮廓和防紫外线玻璃，提供多种尺寸可用于打造北欧照片墙。

title: Potte Ceramic Planter
description: The Potte planter is hand-thrown in the Scandinavian craft tradition from earthy stoneware clay with a reactive glaze that creates unique surface patterns on every piece.

metadata.description_zh: 波泰花盆以斯堪的纳维亚工艺传统手工拉坯，粗陶泥质的反应釉在每件作品上创造独特的表面图案。

title: Tall Neck Vase
description: The Tall Neck Vase's elongated form is perfect for architectural single stems—dried pampas grass, eucalyptus, or a single architectural flower in the Nordic minimal style.

metadata.description_zh: 高颈花瓶的细长造型非常适合建筑感的单支花茎，芒草、桉树叶或北欧极简风格的单朵建筑感花卉。

title: Squash Vase
description: The Squash Vase's organic squash-like silhouette is a playful yet refined Nordic form—hand-thrown in a natural speckled glaze that complements dried or fresh flowers equally.

metadata.description_zh: 葫芦花瓶的有机南瓜状轮廓是俏皮而精致的北欧形态，以与干花或鲜花同样相配的天然斑点釉手工拉坯。

title: Nordic Knot Cushion
description: Hand-knotted macramé cotton gives this cushion cover Nordic-boho charm. The three-dimensional knotted texture adds depth to any sofa or armchair.

metadata.description_zh: 手工打结的棉质麦克拉梅赋予这款抱枕套北欧波西米亚魅力，立体的打结纹理为任何沙发或扶手椅增添层次感。

title: Colour Block Cushion
description: Inspired by Nordic folk textile patterns, this rectangular cushion features bold colour block panels in classic Scandinavian tones—versatile for any Nordic interior.

metadata.description_zh: 受北欧民俗纺织图案启发，这款长方形抱枕以经典斯堪的纳维亚色调的大胆色块面板为特色，适配任何北欧室内。

title: Alpaca Throw
description: Baby alpaca fibre is softer than cashmere and almost as warm as wool—the Alpaca Throw is a Nordic luxury comfort accessory in a natural undyed tone that suits any interior.

metadata.description_zh: 婴儿羊驼纤维比羊绒更柔软，几乎与羊毛一样温暖，羊驼毛毯是天然未染色调的北欧奢华舒适配件，适合任何室内。

title: Cotton Muslin Throw
description: A lightweight Nordic summer throw in 100% cotton muslin—perfect for warm evenings or as a beach blanket for Nordic coastal living. Machine washable and quick-drying.

metadata.description_zh: 100%棉质平纹细布的轻盈北欧夏季毯，非常适合温暖的傍晚或北欧海滨生活的沙滩毯，可机洗且快干。

title: Striped Cotton Rug
description: Classic Nordic stripes in flat-weave cotton—a timeless pattern that suits any Scandinavian interior from coastal to forest themes. Reversible for double the lifespan.

metadata.description_zh: 平纹棉质经典北欧条纹，适合从海滨到森林主题的任何斯堪的纳维亚室内的永恒图案，可翻转使用以延长两倍使用寿命。

title: Jute Natural Rug
description: The Jute Natural Rug celebrates raw Nordic earth tones in a rough, natural weave that adds organic texture underfoot. A sustainable choice from a fast-growing natural fibre.

metadata.description_zh: 黄麻天然地毯以粗糙的天然编织颂扬原始北欧大地色调，为脚下增添有机质感，是来自快速生长天然纤维的可持续选择。

title: Kilim Nordic Rug
description: A Nordic take on the traditional kilim rug—hand-woven in Scandinavia-inspired geometric patterns using natural wool in undyed earth tones. A unique piece of weavable art.

metadata.description_zh: 传统基里姆地毯的北欧诠释，以未染色大地色调的天然羊毛手织斯堪的纳维亚风格几何图案，是独特的可织艺术品。

title: Nordic Poster Set
description: A curated set of three Nordic-inspired art prints—botanical, landscape, and typographic—designed to work together on a gallery wall. Printed on 200 gsm fine art paper.

metadata.description_zh: 精选的三件套北欧风格艺术印刷，包括植物、风景和字体，设计为在照片墙上协调展示，印刷于200克重艺术纸。

title: Minimalist Wall Clock
description: The Minimalist Wall Clock is a clean Nordic statement—powder-coated steel with spare numerals at 12, 3, 6, and 9 only. Its restrained design lets the room breathe.

metadata.description_zh: 极简挂钟是干净的北欧宣言，粉末涂层钢仅在12、3、6、9位置标注极简数字，克制的设计让房间自由呼吸。

title: Wooden Clock
description: The Wooden Clock's laser-cut birch ply face reveals the natural grain of the wood as the clock face—a Nordic celebration of material honesty in functional objects.

metadata.description_zh: 木质壁钟的激光切割桦木板表盘将木材天然纹理展现为时钟表面，是对功能物品材料诚实性的北欧颂扬。

title: Nordic Forest Pillar Candle
description: A hand-poured solid pillar candle scented with Nordic pine and spruce essential oils—the smell of a Scandinavian forest bottled as a home fragrance.

metadata.description_zh: 手工浇注的实心柱形蜡烛，带有北欧松木和云杉精油香气，是装瓶的斯堪的纳维亚森林香气。

title: Hygge Candle Set
description: A curated set of four Nordic hygge candles in complementary scents—pine, birch, sea salt, and vanilla—in reusable ceramic vessels that become Nordic plant pots after burning.

metadata.description_zh: 精选四件套北欧hygge蜡烛，松木、桦树、海盐和香草互补香调，装在燃尽后可用作北欧花盆的可重复使用陶瓷容器中。

title: Gallery Wall Set
description: A carefully proportioned set of six solid oak frames in varying sizes—designed for an effortless Nordic gallery wall. The matching wood tone creates cohesion across the display.

metadata.description_zh: 六件精心比例设计的不同尺寸实心橡木相框套装，专为轻松打造北欧照片墙而设计，统一的木色调在展示中创造凝聚感。

title: Tall Pedestal Planter
description: The Tall Pedestal Planter elevates trailing plants or small trees to a prominent Nordic display position. The ceramic bowl sits on a solid wood pedestal that adds warmth and height.

metadata.description_zh: 高脚底座花盆将垂挂植物或小树提升至显著的北欧展示位置，陶瓷碗坐落于增添温暖与高度的实心木底座上。

title: Hanging Macramé Planter
description: The Hanging Macramé Planter suspends a small ceramic pot in a hand-knotted cotton cradle—a Nordic-boho way to bring greenery to ceiling height without taking up floor space.

metadata.description_zh: 悬挂麦克拉梅花盆挂将小陶瓷盆悬吊在手工打结的棉质支架中，是不占地面空间将绿植延伸至天花高度的北欧波西米亚方式。

title: Concrete Vase
description: Each Concrete Vase is hand-cast and slightly unique—an industrial Nordic aesthetic in functional form. Waterproof interior coating makes it safe for fresh flowers.

metadata.description_zh: 每个混凝土花瓶都是手工铸造且略有独特，功能形态中的工业北欧美学，防水内涂层使其适合鲜花。

title: Terracotta Vase
description: The Terracotta Vase celebrates the unpolished, earthy aesthetic of Nordic craft—hand-formed from red clay with a deliberate rustic glaze that captures the beauty of imperfection.

metadata.description_zh: 赤陶花瓶颂扬北欧工艺的未经抛光、朴实美学，红泥土手工成型，有意为之的质朴釉捕捉不完美之美。

title: Stripe Linen Cushion
description: Classic Nordic stripes on a natural linen cushion—a timeless combination that complements any Scandinavian interior. The removable cover is machine washable.

metadata.description_zh: 天然亚麻抱枕上的经典北欧条纹，与任何斯堪的纳维亚室内相配的永恒组合，可拆卸套可机洗。

title: Nordic Patchwork Cushion
description: A handcrafted patchwork cushion made from offcuts of Nordic wool fabric—a sustainable approach to Nordic textile art that celebrates variety and craft.

metadata.description_zh: 由北欧羊毛面料边角料制成的手工拼布抱枕，是颂扬多样性和工艺的可持续北欧纺织艺术方式。

title: Nordic Plaid Throw
description: The Nordic Plaid Throw in soft cotton flannel brings the warmth of classic Scandinavian cabin culture to any sofa or armchair. Its traditional tartan-inspired pattern is woven in Nordic colours.

metadata.description_zh: 柔软棉法兰绒北欧格纹毯将经典斯堪的纳维亚小屋文化的温暖带入任何沙发或扶手椅，传统格子布启发的图案以北欧色彩编织。

title: Linen Waffle Throw
description: The Linen Waffle Throw's airy waffle texture makes it perfect for transitional Nordic seasons—light enough for summer, textural enough for autumn. A year-round companion.

metadata.description_zh: 亚麻华夫格毯的通透华夫格质感使其非常适合北欧过渡季节，足够轻盈适合夏天，足够有质感适合秋天，是全年伴侣。

title: Cowhide Rug
description: The Natural Cowhide Rug is a Nordic statement piece—each one is unique in its patterning and size. The natural hide brings organic warmth to hardwood Nordic floors.

metadata.description_zh: 天然牛皮地毯是北欧宣言单品，每件在图案和尺寸上都是独一无二的，天然皮革为北欧硬木地板带来有机温暖。

title: Braided Wool Rug
description: The Braided Wool Rug is a Nordic country craft tradition—natural undyed wool braided into a cosy round rug that brings organic warmth to any floor.

metadata.description_zh: 编织羊毛地毯是北欧乡村工艺传统，天然未染色羊毛编织成舒适的圆形地毯，为任何地板带来有机温暖。

title: Landscape Photography Print
description: A high-quality photographic print of iconic Nordic landscape—fjords, birch forests, or northern lights—printed on museum-quality cotton rag paper for lasting vibrancy.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧标志性风景的高质量摄影印刷，峡湾、桦树林或北极光，印刷在博物馆级棉纸上，色彩持久鲜艳。

title: Embossed Metal Wall Art
description: The Embossed Metal Wall Art piece features Nordic geometric motifs hand-pressed into brushed aluminum—a modern interpretation of Scandinavian metal craft traditions.

metadata.description_zh: 压花金属墙饰以手工压制于拉丝铝上的北欧几何图案为特色，是斯堪的纳维亚金属工艺传统的现代诠释。

title: LED Digital Clock
description: A minimal Nordic digital wall clock with a clean LED display in warm amber—shows time and temperature with a simple, readable Nordic typographic approach.

metadata.description_zh: 极简北欧数字墙钟，干净的暖琥珀色LED显示，以简单易读的北欧字体方式显示时间和温度。

title: Geo Planter Set
description: Three angular geometric concrete planters in a Nordic minimal style—hand-cast and slightly unique in each finish. Group together for a dramatic Nordic nature display.

metadata.description_zh: 三个北欧极简风格的角形几何混凝土花盆，手工铸造，每件在表面处理上略有独特，组合在一起形成戏剧性的北欧自然展示。

title: Dried Pampas Arrangement
description: A curated Nordic dried arrangement in a hand-thrown stoneware vase—pampas grass, dried wildflowers, and eucalyptus in muted Nordic tones. Ready to display, lasts for years.

metadata.description_zh: 精选北欧干燥花艺，手工拉坯炻器花瓶中的蒲苇草、干燥野花和桉树叶，采用北欧哑光色调，即可展示，持久数年。

title: Nordic Photo Wall Kit
description: The Nordic Photo Wall Kit contains ten assorted solid oak frames with templates and hanging hardware—everything needed to create a beautiful Scandinavian gallery wall effortlessly.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧照片墙套件包含十个不同尺寸的实心橡木相框，附模板和悬挂五金，轻松打造美丽的斯堪的纳维亚照片墙所需一切。

title: Tray Serving Board
description: A dual-purpose solid walnut serving tray that works equally well as a cutting board and a decorative Nordic kitchen display. Walnut's natural oils resist bacteria.

metadata.description_zh: 双用途实心胡桃木托盘，同样适合用作砧板和装饰性北欧厨房展示，胡桃木的天然油脂能抵抗细菌。

title: Wool Bunting
description: Nordic felt wool pennants strung on a cotton cord—a simple, handmade Nordic decoration for children's rooms, living rooms, or outdoor celebrations.

metadata.description_zh: 棉绳上串着北欧毛毡羊毛三角旗，是儿童房、客厅或户外庆典的简单手工北欧装饰。

title: Incense Burner
description: A minimal Nordic incense burner in solid ash wood—a clean geometric form that holds incense sticks and catches ash with Scandinavian precision and material honesty.

metadata.description_zh: 实心白蜡木极简北欧香炉，干净的几何形态以斯堪的纳维亚精准和材料诚实握住香棒并接住灰烬。

title: Scented Wax Melt Set
description: Eight Nordic-scented soy wax melt discs—pine, birch tar, sea mist, and lavender—for use in any wax warmer. A clean, smoke-free Nordic fragrance experience.

metadata.description_zh: 八件套北欧香调大豆蜡片，松木、桦木焦油、海雾和薰衣草，用于任何蜡片加热器，干净无烟的北欧香氛体验。

specs.Scents: Pine, birch tar, sea mist, lavender

title: Pebble Tray
description: A shallow marble tray filled with smooth natural pebbles—a Nordic nature-inspired desk or bathroom accessory that brings the calm of a Scandinavian shoreline indoors.

metadata.description_zh: 装有光滑天然鹅卵石的浅大理石托盘，受北欧自然启发的桌面或浴室配件，将斯堪的纳维亚海滨的平静带入室内。

title: Driftwood Candle Holder
description: Each Driftwood Candle Holder is a unique piece of Nordic coastal nature—sun-bleached natural driftwood with three candle holes that celebrates the material's own organic beauty.

metadata.description_zh: 每个漂流木烛台都是独特的北欧海岸自然作品，带三个烛孔的日晒天然漂流木颂扬材料自身的有机之美。

title: Abstract Ceramic Bowl
description: A wide, shallow hand-thrown stoneware bowl for displaying Nordic objects—pebbles, seaglass, dried flowers, or fruit. The reactive glaze creates unique surface patterns.

metadata.description_zh: 宽浅的手工拉坯炻器碗用于展示北欧物品，鹅卵石、海玻璃、干花或水果，反应釉创造独特的表面图案。

title: Nordic Textile Wall Hanging
description: The Nordic Textile Wall Hanging is a modern interpretation of Scandinavian weaving traditions—hand-woven geometric cotton with natural fringe, hung on a solid oak rod.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧纺织品墙挂是斯堪的纳维亚编织传统的现代诠释，手工编织几何棉质配天然流苏，悬挂于实心橡木杆上。

title: Woven Wool Pillow Cover
description: Traditional Nordic woven wool in a geometric pattern—this cushion cover celebrates centuries of Scandinavian textile craft with its intricate loom-woven design.

metadata.description_zh: 传统北欧编织羊毛几何图案，这款枕套以其复杂的机织设计颂扬数百年的斯堪的纳维亚纺织工艺。

title: Felted Wool Rug Runner
description: The Felted Wool Runner brings Nordic warmth to hallways, kitchens, and bathrooms. Its dense felted wool construction is naturally stain-resistant and comfortable underfoot.

metadata.description_zh: 毛毡羊毛条形地毯为走廊、厨房和浴室带来北欧温暖，致密的毛毡羊毛构造天然抗污且脚感舒适。

title: Terracotta Pot Set
description: Three classic terracotta pots in graduating sizes—unglazed natural clay in the Nordic tradition of celebrating raw materials. Perfect for herbs, succulents, and indoor plants.

metadata.description_zh: 三个经典赤陶盆渐进尺寸，未上釉的天然泥土体现北欧颂扬原始材料的传统，非常适合香草、多肉植物和室内植物。

title: Nordic Wreath
description: The Nordic Wreath is a year-round Scandinavian home decoration—dried wildflowers, eucalyptus, and cotton stems arranged in a circular form and hung on a cotton cord.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧花环是全年斯堪的纳维亚家居装饰，干燥野花、桉树叶和棉花杆以圆形排列，悬挂于棉绳上。

title: Linen Table Runner
description: The Nordic Linen Table Runner dresses any dining table for casual and formal occasions—natural, stonewashed linen in muted Nordic tones that become more beautiful with every wash.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧亚麻桌旗为任何餐桌装扮休闲和正式场合，天然水洗亚麻以北欧哑光色调在每次洗涤后变得更加美丽。

title: Reindeer Hide Rug
description: A natural Nordic reindeer hide rug—a traditional Scandinavian material that brings the wilderness of the North into any home. Ethically sourced and unique.

metadata.description_zh: 天然北欧驯鹿皮地毯，将北方荒野带入任何家居的传统斯堪的纳维亚材料，道德采购且独一无二。

title: Geometric Mirror
description: The Geometric Mirror's angular brass frame creates a bold Nordic graphic statement on any wall—its irregular polygon form adds architectural interest beyond pure reflection.

metadata.description_zh: 几何镜的角形黄铜框架在任何墙面上创造大胆的北欧图形宣言，不规则多边形形态在纯粹反射之外增添建筑趣味。

title: Teak Armchair
description: This teak armchair is crafted from sustainably certified teak—one of the most weather-resistant woods available. The classic slatted design improves with age and seasonal oiling.

metadata.description_zh: 这款柚木扶手椅以可持续认证柚木打造，是最耐候的木材之一，经典的板条设计随岁月和季节性打油愈发美观。

title: Stack Patio Chair
description: The Stack patio chair is light enough to carry with one hand yet sturdy enough for year-round outdoor use. Powder-coated aluminum means no rust and minimal maintenance.

metadata.description_zh: 斯塔克露台椅轻到单手可提，却足够坚固全年户外使用，粉末涂层铝意味着不生锈且维护极少。

title: Hage Rocking Chair
description: The Hage outdoor rocking chair invites long summer evenings on Nordic terraces and garden decks. Solid teak construction needs only annual oiling to maintain its golden hue.

metadata.description_zh: 哈格户外摇椅邀请人们在北欧露台和花园甲板上享受漫长的夏日傍晚，实心柚木构造仅需年度打油保持金色色调。

title: Teak Garden Table
description: This solid teak garden table is built for Nordic outdoor entertaining. It folds flat for compact winter storage and the sustainably sourced teak weathers to a beautiful silver-grey if left untreated.

metadata.description_zh: 这款实心柚木花园桌专为北欧户外娱乐而建，可平折以紧凑储存过冬，可持续采购的柚木若不处理会风化为美丽的银灰色。

title: Hage Bistro Table
description: The compact Hage bistro table is perfect for a Nordic balcony or small terrace. Its stackable legs fold for easy storage and the UV-stable powder coating resists Nordic weather.

metadata.description_zh: 紧凑的哈格小酒馆桌非常适合北欧阳台或小露台，可叠放的腿部折叠便于储存，抗紫外线粉末涂层抵御北欧天气。

title: Bris Sun Lounger
description: The Bris sun lounger reclines to five positions for the perfect Nordic summer afternoon angle. FSC teak construction ages beautifully and withstands all Nordic outdoor conditions.

metadata.description_zh: 布里斯躺椅可调节为五个角度，适合完美的北欧夏日午后，FSC柚木构造随时间优雅老化，抵御所有北欧户外条件。

title: Stor Outdoor Planter
description: The Stor planter's sleek fibreglass construction is indistinguishable from concrete at a fraction of the weight—perfect for Nordic terraces and balconies where weight limits apply.

metadata.description_zh: 斯托尔花盆的光滑玻璃纤维构造与混凝土外观难以区分，重量却仅有后者的一小部分，非常适合有重量限制的北欧露台和阳台。

title: Korg Wicker Planter
description: A natural seagrass wicker basket with a removable waterproof plastic liner—the ideal Nordic planter for covered terraces, pergolas, or indoor-outdoor living spaces.

metadata.description_zh: 天然海草柳编篮配可拆卸防水塑料内衬，是有遮蔽的露台、棚架或室内外过渡空间的理想北欧花盆。

title: Utepute Outdoor Cushion
description: The Utepute outdoor cushion is filled with quick-dry foam and covered in UV-resistant Sunbrella fabric—the Nordic answer to outdoor comfort that lasts multiple summers.

metadata.description_zh: 乌特普特户外坐垫填充快干泡沫，覆以防紫外线Sunbrella面料，是可持续多个夏季的北欧户外舒适方案。

title: Parasoll Cantilever Umbrella
description: The Parasoll cantilever umbrella shades a large area without a central pole getting in the way. Its Sunbrella canopy filters 98% of UV rays while the rotating function follows the sun.

metadata.description_zh: 帕拉索尔悬臂遮阳伞无需中心柱即可为大面积遮阳，Sunbrella伞面过滤98%紫外线，旋转功能可追随太阳方向。

title: Ild Fire Pit
description: The Ild fire pit is crafted from self-patinating Corten steel that develops a rich rust-brown appearance over time—a Nordic approach to material beauty through weathering.

metadata.description_zh: 伊尔德火盆以自然成锈的耐候钢打造，随时间发展出丰富的锈棕色外观，体现北欧通过风化展现材料之美的理念。

title: Folding Bistro Chair
description: The Folding Bistro Chair is a Nordic balcony and café essential—lightweight powder-coated steel that folds flat for easy winter storage. Available in classic Nordic colours.

metadata.description_zh: 折叠小酒馆椅是北欧阳台和咖啡馆的必备，轻便的粉末涂层钢可平折便于冬季储存，提供经典北欧色彩选择。

title: Rope Weave Chair
description: Premium hand-woven rope over a powder-coated aluminum frame—the Rope Weave Chair is designed for all-weather Nordic outdoor use and provides exceptional comfort with its ergonomic back curve.

metadata.description_zh: 粉末涂层铝框架上的高级手工编织绳，绳编椅专为全天候北欧户外使用而设计，人体工学的背部曲线提供卓越舒适感。

title: Adirondack Nordic Chair
description: The Adirondack Chair reimagined in Nordic style—FSC pine with a natural finish, wide flat armrests perfect for a coffee cup, and a deeply reclined seat ideal for summer afternoon relaxation.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧风格重新诠释的阿迪朗达克椅，FSC松木天然处理，宽大平坦的扶手非常适合放咖啡杯，深度后倾的座椅非常适合夏日午后放松。

title: Extendable Garden Table
description: The Extendable Garden Table grows from a 6-seat to an 8-seat table at the pull of its butterfly extension leaf—ideal for Nordic summer entertaining with varying guest numbers.

metadata.description_zh: 可延伸花园桌只需拉开蝴蝶延伸板，即可从六人桌增大为八人桌，非常适合人数不定的北欧夏日娱乐。

title: Mosaic Bistro Table
description: A Nordic interpretation of the classic Mediterranean bistro table—hand-laid mosaic tile top on a sturdy wrought iron base, designed to add colour and character to outdoor dining.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧对经典地中海小酒馆桌的诠释，手工铺设的马赛克瓷砖桌面立于坚固的熟铁底座上，为户外就餐增添色彩和个性。

title: Double Sun Lounger
description: The Double Sun Lounger is the Nordic outdoor luxury experience—a full double-width teak deck chair perfect for sharing Nordic summer afternoons with someone you love.

metadata.description_zh: 双人躺椅是北欧户外奢华体验，完整双人宽度的柚木甲板椅，非常适合与心爱的人共享北欧夏日午后。

title: Window Box Planter
description: The Window Box Planter brings Nordic garden colour to balcony railings and window sills. Weatherproof fibreglass with drainage holes and a matching saucer.

metadata.description_zh: 窗台花盆将北欧花园色彩带到阳台栏杆和窗台，附带排水孔和配套托盘的防水玻璃纤维。

title: Tall Column Planter
description: The Tall Column Planter makes a dramatic vertical statement in Nordic gardens and terraces. Concrete-look fibreglass at a fraction of the weight, with an inner drainage system.

metadata.description_zh: 高柱形花盆在北欧花园和露台上营造戏剧性的垂直感，混凝土外观玻璃纤维仅有后者一小部分的重量，带内置排水系统。

title: Beach Umbrella
description: A simple Nordic beach umbrella in cotton canvas—its classic striped pattern and natural wood pole bring Scandinavian coastal charm to any beach or garden.

metadata.description_zh: 简单的棉帆布北欧沙滩伞，经典条纹图案和天然木杆为任何海滩或花园带来斯堪的纳维亚海滨魅力。

title: Portable Fire Bowl
description: The Portable Fire Bowl is a compact Nordic fire feature perfect for small terraces and balconies. Corten steel ages to a beautiful patina and can be carried to any outdoor space.

metadata.description_zh: 便携火碗是紧凑的北欧火焰装置，非常适合小露台和阳台，耐候钢随时间形成美丽的包浆，可携带至任何户外空间。

title: Cast Iron Fire Pit
description: The Cast Iron Fire Pit doubles as a BBQ grill with its included cooking grate—a Nordic multi-function outdoor feature for year-round entertaining and al fresco cooking.

metadata.description_zh: 铸铁火盆配附带的烤架兼作烧烤炉，是用于全年娱乐和户外烹饪的北欧多功能户外装置。

title: Reclining Patio Chair
description: The Reclining Patio Chair adjusts to multiple recline positions via a simple lever, making it as useful for working outside as for sunbathing. Lightweight aluminum and quick-dry Textilene.

metadata.description_zh: 可调躺椅通过简单的杠杆调节为多个后倾位置，既适合户外工作也适合日光浴，轻量铝材和快干特力纶面料。

title: Hanging Egg Chair Outdoor
description: The Outdoor Hanging Egg Chair is the ultimate Nordic garden luxury—a cocoon of all-weather wicker suspended from a powder-coated steel stand, gently swaying with the summer breeze.

metadata.description_zh: 户外吊蛋椅是北欧花园的终极奢华，全天候柳编茧形椅悬挂于粉末涂层钢架上，随夏日微风轻轻摇摆。

title: Pedestal Garden Table
description: The Pedestal Garden Table on a single central column base is ideal for small Nordic terraces—it seats four without corner legs getting in the way, and the aluminium never rusts.

metadata.description_zh: 底座花园桌以单中心柱底座非常适合小型北欧露台，无需担心桌角阻碍可容纳四人，铝材永不生锈。

title: Fabric Sun Lounger
description: The Fabric Sun Lounger's breathable Textilene weave allows air circulation to keep you cool on Nordic summer days. Aluminium frame is lightweight and rust-proof.

metadata.description_zh: 布艺躺椅的透气特力纶编织允许空气流通，在北欧夏日保持凉爽，铝制框架轻便且防锈。

title: Raised Garden Bed
description: The Raised Garden Bed is a Nordic kitchen garden essential—FSC cedar naturally resists decay and insects. Grow herbs, vegetables, and flowers at a comfortable working height.

metadata.description_zh: 升高花床是北欧厨房花园的必备，FSC雪松天然抵抗腐烂和昆虫，在舒适的工作高度种植香草、蔬菜和花卉。

title: Striped Outdoor Cushion
description: Classic Nordic stripes in all-weather Sunbrella fabric—this outdoor cushion brings Scandinavian coastal pattern to any garden chair, bench, or sun lounger.

metadata.description_zh: 全天候Sunbrella面料的经典北欧条纹，这款户外坐垫为任何花园椅、长凳或躺椅带来斯堪的纳维亚海岸图案。

title: Tabletop Fire Bowl
description: The Tabletop Fire Bowl burns clean bio-ethanol fuel with no smoke or ash—a Nordic dinner party essential that creates real firelight atmosphere on any table.

metadata.description_zh: 桌面火碗燃烧清洁的生物乙醇燃料，无烟无灰，是任何桌面营造真实火光氛围的北欧晚宴必备。

title: Outdoor Umbrella Base
description: The Cast Iron Umbrella Base provides rock-solid stability for market umbrellas in Nordic outdoor conditions. The 18 kg weight prevents tipping even in strong coastal winds.

metadata.description_zh: 铸铁伞座为北欧户外条件下的市场伞提供坚如磐石的稳定性，18公斤的重量即使在强劲的海岸风中也能防止倾翻。

title: Nordic Garden Sofa Set
description: A complete Nordic outdoor living set—FSC teak sofa, two armchairs, and a coffee table with premium Sunbrella cushions. Ready to create an outdoor Nordic living room.

metadata.description_zh: 完整的北欧户外生活套装，FSC柚木沙发、两把扶手椅和咖啡桌配优质Sunbrella坐垫，打造户外北欧客厅。

title: Folding Garden Table Set
description: A space-saving Nordic balcony set—a folding table and two chairs that collapse flat for winter storage. Perfect for compact city terraces and small gardens.

metadata.description_zh: 节省空间的北欧阳台套装，折叠桌和两把椅子可平折冬季储存，非常适合紧凑的城市露台和小花园。

title: Outdoor Side Table
description: A lightweight Nordic outdoor side table that moves effortlessly around the terrace or garden. Its stackable design makes winter storage simple.

metadata.description_zh: 轻量北欧户外边桌在露台或花园中轻松移动，可叠放设计使冬季储存简便。

title: Shade Sail
description: The Nordic Shade Sail blocks up to 95% of UV radiation over a large outdoor area. Its HDPE fabric is breathable, water-repellent, and available in natural Nordic tones.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧遮阳帆阻挡大面积户外区域高达95%的紫外线，高密度聚乙烯面料透气、防水，提供天然北欧色调。
metadata.material_zh: 高密度聚乙烯，三角遮阳帆

title: Outdoor Storage Box
description: The Outdoor Storage Box stores cushions, gardening tools, and outdoor accessories in a weatherproof resin wicker box that looks beautiful on any Nordic terrace.

metadata.description_zh: 户外储物箱将坐垫、园艺工具和户外配件存储于看起来美观的防水树脂柳编箱中，适合任何北欧露台。

title: Outdoor Rug
description: The Outdoor Rug in Nordic geometric patterns is made from recycled plastic bottles—a sustainable Scandinavian choice that withstands all weather while looking beautiful on any terrace.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧几何图案户外地毯由再生塑料瓶制成，在任何露台上既耐候又美观的可持续斯堪的纳维亚选择。

title: Garden Lantern
description: The Garden Lantern adds Nordic warmth to outdoor evenings—galvanized steel and clear glass panels create a classic Scandinavian lantern that protects the flame in light wind.

metadata.description_zh: 花园提灯为户外夜晚增添北欧温暖，镀锌钢和透明玻璃板创造在轻风中保护火焰的经典斯堪的纳维亚提灯。

title: Bistro Set Rattan
description: A complete Nordic outdoor bistro set in all-weather rattan—round table and two armchairs with removable cushions for breakfasts and lunches on any Nordic terrace.

metadata.description_zh: 三件套全天候藤编北欧户外小酒馆套装，圆桌和两把带可拆卸坐垫的扶手椅，适合任何北欧露台的早餐和午餐。

title: Hanging Planter Trio
description: Three hemp rope hanging planters in graduating sizes—a Nordic indoor-outdoor plant display system that elevates greenery to eye level on any wall, fence, or branch.

metadata.description_zh: 三个渐进尺寸的麻绳悬挂花盆，是将绿植提升至任何墙壁、围栏或树枝上视线高度的北欧室内外植物展示系统。

title: Teak Sun Lounger Cushion
description: A full-length Sunbrella sun lounger cushion for Nordic teak outdoor furniture—UV-resistant, quick-drying, and available in classic Nordic blue, white, and grey tones.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧柚木户外家具的全长Sunbrella躺椅坐垫，防紫外线、快干，提供经典北欧蓝色、白色和灰色色调。

title: Outdoor Folding Chair
description: A simple, sturdy Nordic folding chair for gardens, camping, and terraces. Lightweight powder-coated steel folds flat in seconds for easy transport and storage.

metadata.description_zh: 简单坚固的北欧折叠椅适合花园、露营和露台，轻便的粉末涂层钢几秒内平折，便于运输和储存。

title: Sko Hallway Shoe Rack
description: The Sko hallway shoe rack is a compact Nordic entrance solution. Four tiers store up to 8 pairs, and its slim profile fits neatly beside any Nordic door without blocking passage.

metadata.description_zh: 斯科走廊鞋架是紧凑的北欧入口解决方案，四层可存放最多八双鞋，纤薄的轮廓紧贴任何北欧门旁而不阻碍通行。

title: Bench Shoe Storage
description: This hallway bench conceals shoe storage under its hinged seat—a clever Nordic dual-function design that provides a place to sit when putting on shoes while keeping the entrance tidy.

metadata.description_zh: 这款门廊长凳在翻盖座下隐藏鞋柜储物，是聪明的北欧双功能设计，在穿鞋时提供坐处，同时保持入口整洁。

title: Hatt Coat Rack
description: The Hatt coat rack stands elegantly in any Nordic hallway, with 8 solid oak hooks at varying heights accommodating coats, bags, scarves, and keys. The weighted base ensures stability.

metadata.description_zh: 哈特衣帽架优雅地矗立于任何北欧走廊，八个不同高度的实心橡木挂钩可挂外套、包袋、围巾和钥匙，加重底座确保稳定。

title: Vägg Wall Hook Set
description: The Vägg wall hook set installs easily with three screws to deliver five beautiful solid brass hooks. The minimal Nordic form suits any hallway, bathroom, or kitchen.

metadata.description_zh: 瓦格壁挂钩套装仅需三颗螺丝即可安装，提供五个精美的实心黄铜挂钩，极简的北欧造型适合任何走廊、浴室或厨房。

title: Korg Seagrass Basket
description: Hand-woven from natural seagrass by skilled artisans, this Nordic storage basket is beautiful enough to display and practical enough for blankets, toys, or laundry.

metadata.description_zh: 由熟练工匠以天然海草手工编织，这款北欧储物篮兼具展示美感和存放毯子、玩具或洗衣的实用性。

title: Oppbevaring Cotton Basket
description: The Oppbevaring chunky rope basket is a Nordic nursery and bathroom essential. Machine-washable cotton rope construction handles everything from bath toys to spare toilet rolls.

metadata.description_zh: 奥普贝瓦宁粗绳篮是北欧婴儿房和浴室的必备单品，可机洗棉绳构造可存放从浴室玩具到备用卫生纸卷的各类物品。

title: Box Lid Storage Box
description: The Box Lid storage box combines a soft felt body with a solid oak lid—a Nordic design pairing that looks beautiful on shelves or desks while hiding away small clutter.

metadata.description_zh: 博克斯储物盒将柔软毛毡盒体与实心橡木盖结合，是摆放在搁架或桌上既美观又能隐藏小杂物的北欧设计组合。

title: Peg Oak Hook
description: The simplest Nordic wall hook—a solid oak Shaker-inspired peg that installs in seconds. Group multiples in a row for a classic Scandinavian wall hook rail.

metadata.description_zh: 最简洁的北欧壁钩，受震颤派风格启发的实心橡木木钉，几秒内即可安装，多个成排打造经典斯堪的纳维亚挂钩条。

title: Nøkkel Key Holder
description: The Nøkkel key holder is a small but essential piece of Nordic entrance organisation. Three brass hooks hold keys, and a small shelf above is perfect for reminders or a small plant.

metadata.description_zh: 诺克尔钥匙挂架是北欧入口组织的小却必不可少的单品，三个黄铜钩挂钥匙，上方小搁板完美放置提醒事项或小植物。

title: Bad Bathroom Shelf
description: The Bad bathroom shelf is crafted from naturally water-resistant teak for lasting beauty in wet environments. Two tiers hold toiletries, candles, and plants with Nordic serenity.

metadata.description_zh: 巴德浴室搁架以天然耐水柚木打造，在潮湿环境中持久美观，两层搁板以北欧宁静感放置盥洗用品、蜡烛和植物。

title: Rulla Towel Ladder
description: The Rulla towel ladder leans naturally against the bathroom wall, holding multiple towels or robes in a minimal Nordic manner. Solid bamboo is naturally moisture-resistant.

metadata.description_zh: 鲁拉毛巾梯自然倚靠浴室墙壁，以极简的北欧方式悬挂多条毛巾或浴袍，实心竹天然抗湿。

title: Cabinet Shoe Storage
description: The Cabinet Shoe Storage conceals up to 12 pairs of shoes behind two slim doors—a clean Nordic entrance solution that disguises functional storage as a handsome hallway cabinet.

metadata.description_zh: 橱柜鞋柜在两扇纤薄门后隐藏最多12双鞋，是将功能性储物伪装为精致走廊柜的干净北欧入口解决方案。

title: Tiered Shoe Tower
description: The Tiered Shoe Tower rotates 360° for easy access to every pair—a space-saving Nordic solution that holds 8 pairs in a minimal floor footprint.

metadata.description_zh: 层叠鞋塔可360°旋转方便取用每双鞋，是在最小地面占地面积内存放8双鞋的节省空间北欧解决方案。

title: Peg Rail Long
description: The Long Peg Rail is a Nordic hallway classic—six solid oak Shaker-inspired pegs on a wall-mounted oak rail that creates a beautiful and highly functional entrance display.

metadata.description_zh: 长挂钩条是北欧走廊经典，六个受震颤派启发的实心橡木木钉安装于橡木壁挂条上，创造美观且高度功能性的入口展示。

title: Umbrella Stand
description: A sleek Nordic umbrella stand in powder-coated steel with an integrated drip tray to keep the hallway floor dry. Slim enough to fit beside any door without obstruction.

metadata.description_zh: 粉末涂层钢制简洁北欧雨伞架，配集成接水盘保持走廊地板干燥，足够纤薄可放置于任何门旁而不阻碍通行。

title: Laundry Hamper
description: The Laundry Hamper keeps the bedroom tidy with its tall woven rattan body and lift-off lid—a Nordic alternative to the plastic laundry basket that looks beautiful on display.

metadata.description_zh: 脏衣篓以其高大的编织藤编身体和揭盖保持卧室整洁，是可美观展示的北欧替代塑料洗衣篮方案。

title: Market Tote Basket
description: A Nordic market basket in hand-woven seagrass with leather handles—equally at home on a kitchen shelf, beside a sofa, or on a bicycle to the weekend market.

metadata.description_zh: 手工编织海草配皮革把手的北欧市场购物篮，同样适合放在厨房架、沙发旁或骑车去周末市场。

title: Lid Box Stacking Set
description: Three nesting birch plywood boxes with lids—a Nordic office and bedroom organisation system that stacks neatly to save space while looking beautiful on a shelf.

metadata.description_zh: 三件相互嵌套的带盖桦木夹板盒，是北欧办公室和卧室整理系统，可整洁叠放节省空间，同时在搁架上美观展示。

title: Under-Bed Storage
description: The Under-Bed Storage box maximises unused space below a Nordic bed frame. Its low profile, cotton canvas construction, and dual zipper closure make it both functional and beautiful.

metadata.description_zh: 床下储物盒最大化北欧床架下未使用的空间，低矮的轮廓、棉帆布构造和双拉链封口兼具实用与美观。

title: Brass Numbered Hook
description: A single solid brass hook engraved with a number 1-9—a Nordic design detail that turns simple hooks into a graphic wall element. Collect multiples for a numbered hook rail.

metadata.description_zh: 刻有1-9号码的单个实心黄铜挂钩，是将简单挂钩转化为图形墙壁元素的北欧设计细节，收集多个打造编号挂钩条。

title: Magnetic Key Rail
description: The Magnetic Key Rail holds keys on five strong neodymium magnets embedded in a solid oak strip—a minimal Nordic approach to hallway organisation.

metadata.description_zh: 磁性钥匙条以嵌入实心橡木条的五个强力钕铁硼磁铁固定钥匙，是走廊整理的极简北欧方式。

title: Over Toilet Cabinet
description: The Over Toilet Cabinet transforms wasted space above the toilet into useful Nordic storage. Two adjustable shelves behind a mirrored door organise bathroom essentials with Scandinavian efficiency.

metadata.description_zh: 马桶上方储物柜将马桶上方浪费的空间变成有用的北欧储物，镜面门后的两个可调节搁板以斯堪的纳维亚效率整理浴室必需品。

title: Bamboo Bathroom Organiser
description: The Bamboo Bathroom Organiser sits on a countertop or shelf to bring Nordic order to skincare routines and bathroom essentials. Naturally moisture-resistant bamboo suits wet environments.

metadata.description_zh: 竹制浴室整理架放置于台面或搁架上，为护肤程序和浴室必需品带来北欧秩序，天然抗湿竹材适合潮湿环境。

title: Pull-Out Shoe Drawer
description: The Pull-Out Shoe Drawer fits neatly under a hallway bench or console table—two pull-out trays each hold 4 pairs of shoes and slide smoothly on metal runners.

metadata.description_zh: 拉出式鞋抽屉整洁地放置于走廊长凳或控制台桌下，两个拉出托盘各可放4双鞋，在金属滑轨上顺滑滑动。

title: Kids Coat Rack
description: Designed for small Nordic coat-hangers—the Kids Coat Rack has hooks at child height so little ones can hang their own coats and bags independently from early on.

metadata.description_zh: 专为小型北欧挂钩设计，儿童衣帽架有儿童高度的挂钩，让小朋友从小就能独立挂自己的外套和包袋。

title: Rustic Antler Hooks
description: The Rustic Antler Hook set is a Nordic cabin essential—cast iron in the shape of natural antler branches, with four hooks that hold coats, hats, and scarves with character.

metadata.description_zh: 质朴鹿角挂钩套装是北欧小屋必备，铸铁塑造天然鹿角枝条形状，四个挂钩以有个性的方式悬挂外套、帽子和围巾。

title: Newspaper Basket
description: A Nordic living room essential—the Newspaper Basket holds papers, remote controls, and small items in a tightly woven paper rope construction that is both light and sturdy.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧客厅必备，报纸篮以紧密编织纸绳构造存放报纸、遥控器和小物品，轻盈且坚固。

title: Toy Storage Basket
description: The Toy Storage Basket is a Nordic nursery essential—a collapsible cotton canvas bin that keeps children's rooms tidy and folds flat when not in use.

metadata.description_zh: 玩具储物篮是北欧婴儿房必备，可折叠棉帆布桶保持儿童房整洁，不用时可平折。

title: Rattan Storage Box
description: The Rattan Storage Box is a Nordic living room essential—hand-woven rattan with a hinged lid conceals remote controls, cables, and small clutter in organic Nordic style.

metadata.description_zh: 藤编储物盒是北欧客厅必备，带铰链盖的手工藤编以有机北欧风格遮藏遥控器、电缆和小杂物。

title: Leather Box
description: A genuine leather storage box with a fitted lid—a Nordic luxury desk accessory for storing cufflinks, cards, jewellery, or any small precious objects in style.

metadata.description_zh: 带配合盖的真皮储物盒，是以风格存放袖扣、卡片、珠宝或任何小贵重物品的北欧奢华桌面配件。

title: Minimalist Wall Rail
description: The Minimalist Wall Rail is a long Shaker-inspired peg rail in solid oak that can be installed in hallways, kitchens, or bathrooms. Eight hooks at equal spacing provide generous hanging capacity.

metadata.description_zh: 极简壁轨是实心橡木长款受震颤派启发的挂钩条，可安装于走廊、厨房或浴室，八个等距挂钩提供宽裕的悬挂容量。

title: Ceramic Knob Hook
description: A single Nordic-style ceramic knob hook for walls, kitchens, and bathrooms—hand-glazed in Nordic earth tones with a polished brass screw fitting. Collect multiples for a wall display.

metadata.description_zh: 墙壁、厨房和浴室用的单个北欧风格陶瓷旋钮挂钩，以北欧大地色调手工上釉配抛光黄铜螺丝配件，收集多个打造墙面展示。

title: Teak Shower Shelf
description: The Teak Shower Shelf mounts in a shower or bathroom corner, holding shampoos, soaps, and razors. FSC teak is naturally water-resistant and improves with age in wet environments.

metadata.description_zh: 柚木淋浴架安装于淋浴或浴室角落，存放洗发水、肥皂和剃须刀，FSC柚木天然抗水，在潮湿环境中随时间愈发美观。

title: Mirror Cabinet Bathroom
description: The Mirror Cabinet Bathroom doubles as a mirror and storage cabinet—medicine, toiletries, and small items behind the mirror keep the bathroom surface clean in Nordic style.

metadata.description_zh: 浴室镜柜兼作镜子和储物柜，镜子后的药品、盥洗用品和小物品以北欧风格保持浴室桌面整洁。

title: Freestanding Towel Rail
description: The Freestanding Towel Rail holds three towels on solid bamboo rails without any wall mounting—perfect for Nordic bathrooms where you want flexible positioning.

metadata.description_zh: 独立毛巾架在实心竹横杆上悬挂三条毛巾，无需任何墙壁安装，非常适合需要灵活定位的北欧浴室。

title: Entry Organiser Cabinet
description: The Entry Organiser Cabinet provides complete hallway storage in a slim full-height cabinet—shoe storage below, coat hanging in the middle, and shelf space at the top for bags and hats.

metadata.description_zh: 入口整理柜在纤薄的全高柜子中提供完整的走廊储物，下方鞋柜、中间挂衣、顶部搁板放包袋和帽子。

title: Pegboard System
description: The Nordic Pegboard System is a flexible wall organisation tool—a steel pegboard with a set of hooks, shelves, and brackets that can be rearranged to meet changing storage needs.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧钉板系统是灵活的墙面组织工具，钢制钉板配一套挂钩、搁板和支架，可重新排列以满足不断变化的储物需求。

title: Wardrobe Organiser Set
description: Eight felt organisers—drawer dividers, tie boxes, and shelf compartments—designed to bring Nordic order to any wardrobe interior. The soft grey felt complements any wood interior.

metadata.description_zh: 八件毛毡整理件，抽屉分格、领带盒和搁架分格，设计为为任何衣柜内部带来北欧秩序，柔软的灰色毛毡与任何木质内部相配。

title: Double Hook Rail
description: Double hooks rather than single—the Nordic Double Hook Rail accommodates coats plus a bag or scarf on each hook position, doubling the hanging capacity of a standard rail.

metadata.description_zh: 双钩而非单钩，北欧双钩条在每个挂钩位置容纳外套加包袋或围巾，将标准挂钩条的悬挂容量翻倍。

title: Bathroom Vanity Organiser
description: The clear acrylic Bathroom Vanity Organiser brings Nordic clarity to the countertop—visible storage for skincare products, brushes, and cotton items with clean geometric compartments.

metadata.description_zh: 透明亚克力浴室梳妆台整理架为台面带来北欧通透感，干净的几何格子为护肤品、刷子和棉质物品提供可见储物。

title: Laundry Sorter 3-Bag
description: The Laundry Sorter makes pre-sorting laundry simple—three removable canvas bags on a bamboo frame sort whites, colours, and delicates in true Nordic organised fashion.

metadata.description_zh: 三格分类洗衣架使预分类洗衣变得简单，竹框架上的三个可拆卸帆布袋以真正的北欧整洁方式分类白色、彩色和精细衣物。

title: Sliding Door Wardrobe
description: This floor-to-ceiling sliding door wardrobe maximises a bedroom wall with four large mirror panels that make the room appear twice as large—a Nordic space-transformation solution.

metadata.description_zh: 这款地到天花板推拉门衣柜以四块大镜面板最大化卧室墙面，使房间看起来两倍大，是北欧空间改造解决方案。

title: Wooden Crate Storage
description: Simple solid pine crates stacked or arranged individually—a Nordic farmhouse storage and display solution that works in kitchens, living rooms, or children's rooms.

metadata.description_zh: 简单的实心松木箱可叠放或单独排列，适合厨房、客厅或儿童房的北欧农舍储物和展示解决方案。

title: Over-Door Organiser
description: The Over-Door Organiser hangs over any standard door without drilling—four hooks provide easy access storage for coats, bags, and accessories in a Nordic minimal steel design.

metadata.description_zh: 门后整理架无需钻孔挂于任何标准门上，四个挂钩以北欧极简钢铁设计为外套、包袋和配件提供便捷储物。

title: Rope Hanging Shelf
description: The Rope Hanging Shelf suspends from the ceiling on four hemp ropes—a Nordic-boho display shelf that floats gracefully with any gentle movement, adding life to the room.

metadata.description_zh: 绳挂搁板以四根麻绳从天花板悬挂，是随任何轻微动作优雅漂浮、为房间增添生气的北欧波西米亚展示架。

title: Felt Drawer Dividers
description: Adjustable felt drawer dividers in Nordic grey—a simple Scandinavian solution for keeping desk and bedroom drawers organised without damaging the wood surfaces.

metadata.description_zh: 可调节北欧灰色毛毡抽屉分格，是保持桌面和卧室抽屉整洁而不损坏木质表面的简单斯堪的纳维亚解决方案。

title: Decorative Hooks Set
description: Four brushed-gold Nordic wall hooks sold as a set—elegant enough to display jewellery and scarves, strong enough to hold winter coats.

metadata.description_zh: 四件套拉丝金北欧壁钩套装，足够优雅展示珠宝和围巾，足够坚固悬挂冬季外套。

title: Stair Basket Storage
description: The Stair Basket is designed for Nordic homes with stairs—a flat-base basket that sits securely on stair treads to collect items needing to go up or down.

metadata.description_zh: 楼梯篮专为有楼梯的北欧家居设计，平底篮安全放置于楼梯踏板上，收集需要上下楼的物品。

title: Key Board Organiser
description: The Key Board Organiser combines a row of oak pegs with a magnetic tray for mail and a small shelf for sunglasses—the complete Nordic hallway organisation solution.

metadata.description_zh: 钥匙板整理架将一排橡木钉与邮件磁性托盘和太阳镜小搁板结合，是完整的北欧走廊组织解决方案。

title: Plinth Coffee Table
description: A sculptural Nordic statement—a solid concrete plinth top in natural grey on a minimal powder-coated steel frame, creating an elemental focal point in any living room.

metadata.description_zh: 雕塑感北欧宣言，天然灰色实心混凝土台基桌面立于极简粉末涂层钢框架上，在任何客厅创造元素级视觉焦点。
metadata.material_zh: 实心混凝土台基桌面，钢

title: Linen Tufted Sofa
description: Deep tufting in natural linen brings a heritage Nordic quality to this three-seater sofa. Solid oak legs complete a piece that honours the tradition of quality Scandinavian furniture making.

metadata.description_zh: 天然亚麻深度钮扣为这款三人沙发带来传统北欧品质，实心橡木腿完成一件尊重高品质斯堪的纳维亚家具制造传统的作品。

title: Quilted Headboard Bed
description: The Quilted Headboard Bed's diamond-quilted velvet headboard brings Nordic luxury hotel aesthetics to the bedroom—a sumptuous backdrop for morning reading and evening relaxation.

metadata.description_zh: 绗缝床头板床的菱形绗缝丝绒床头板将北欧豪华酒店美学带入卧室，是晨间阅读和傍晚放松的奢华背景。
metadata.material_zh: 绗缝丝绒床头板，山毛榉

title: Wood Bead Curtain
description: A Nordic-boho room divider and window dressing—natural wood beads on cotton cord create a light-filtering screen that adds organic texture to any Scandinavian space.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧波西米亚房间隔断和窗帘，棉绳上的天然木珠创造过滤光线的屏风，为任何斯堪的纳维亚空间增添有机质感。

title: White Dining Chair Set
description: Four crisp white dining chairs in solid beech—a Nordic essential for bright, Scandi-style dining rooms. The white finish reflects light and pairs with any dining table colour.

metadata.description_zh: 四把洁白实心山毛榉餐椅，是明亮北欧风餐厅的必备单品，白色表面反射光线，与任何颜色的餐桌相配。

title: Walnut Sideboard Long
description: The long Walnut Sideboard is a dining room centrepiece—solid walnut with four push-to-open doors concealing generous adjustable storage. A timeless investment in Nordic craftsmanship.

metadata.description_zh: 胡桃木长型餐边柜是餐厅中心，实心胡桃木配四扇按压开门遮藏宽大的可调节储物，是北欧工艺的永恒投资。

title: Trestle Desk Oak
description: The Trestle Desk is a Nordic workshop icon adapted for the home office—a thick solid oak plank top on two A-frame trestle supports that can be dismantled when moving.

metadata.description_zh: 锯架桌是为家庭办公室改编的北欧工坊图标，厚实的实心橡木板桌面立于两个可搬移时拆卸的A形锯架支撑上。

title: Marble Arc Floor Lamp
description: The most elegant of Nordic floor lamps—a white Carrara marble base supports a slender brass arc that curves overhead to position the linen shade perfectly for reading.

metadata.description_zh: 最优雅的北欧落地灯，白色卡拉拉大理石底座支撑纤细的黄铜弧曲线，将亚麻灯罩完美定位以便阅读。
metadata.material_zh: 白色大理石底座，黄铜弧

title: Mushroom Table Lamp
description: The Mushroom Table Lamp's dome-shaped frosted glass shade glows warmly in every direction—a Nordic mid-century-inspired form that has become a modern Scandinavian classic.

metadata.description_zh: 蘑菇台灯的穹形磨砂玻璃灯罩向各方向温暖发光，受北欧中世纪启发的形态已成为现代斯堪的纳维亚经典。

title: Paper Lantern Set
description: Five Nordic paper lanterns in muted natural tones—hang them at varying heights for a Scandinavian-inspired bedroom or living room canopy of gentle light.

metadata.description_zh: 五个北欧纸灯笼以哑光天然色调，在不同高度悬挂，打造北欧风格卧室或客厅的柔和光晕天幕。

title: Geometric Planter Trio
description: Three hexagonal ceramic planters in graduated sizes with minimal Nordic geometric detailing—perfect for displaying succulents, cacti, or small herbs on a windowsill or shelf.

metadata.description_zh: 三个渐进尺寸的六边形陶瓷花盆配极简北欧几何细节，非常适合在窗台或搁架上展示多肉植物、仙人掌或小香草。

title: Coat Tree
description: The Nordic Coat Tree stands like a minimalist forest element in any hallway—eight sturdy solid pine hooks on a central pole provide generous hanging for the whole household.

metadata.description_zh: 北欧落地衣架如极简的森林元素矗立于任何走廊，中心柱上的八个坚固实心松木挂钩为整个家庭提供充裕的悬挂空间。

title: Linen Closet Organiser
description: Three coordinated linen storage boxes with cotton rope handles—a Nordic bedroom and wardrobe organisation system that keeps shelves tidy while looking beautiful.

metadata.description_zh: 三件协调的亚麻储物盒配棉绳把手，是保持搁架整洁同时美观的北欧卧室和衣柜整理系统。

title: Outdoor Dining Set 6
description: A complete Nordic outdoor dining experience—FSC teak table with six matching teak dining chairs and Sunbrella cushions. Ready for summer al fresco dining on any Nordic terrace.

metadata.description_zh: 完整的北欧户外就餐体验，FSC柚木桌配六把匹配的柚木餐椅和Sunbrella坐垫，适合任何北欧露台的夏日露天就餐。

title: Solar Garden Lights
description: No cables, no electricity—these Nordic solar garden lights charge silently during the day and create warm ambient light for Nordic outdoor evenings automatically at dusk.

metadata.description_zh: 无电缆无电力，这些北欧太阳能花园灯在白天静静充电，在黄昏时自动为北欧户外夜晚创造温暖的氛围光。

title: Linen Bedding Set
description: A complete stone-washed linen bedding set in Nordic earth tones—duvet cover, two pillowcases, and a flat sheet in 100% French linen that softens with every wash.

metadata.description_zh: 完整的水洗亚麻床上用品套装，北欧大地色调，包括被套、两个枕套和100%法国亚麻床单，每次洗涤后更加柔软。

title: Knitted Blanket Throw
description: A hand-arm-knitted merino throw in oversized Nordic stitches—the ultimate cosy companion for Scandinavian winter evenings. Each one is individually crafted.

metadata.description_zh: 手臂编织的美利奴毯，超大北欧针脚，是斯堪的纳维亚冬夜的终极舒适伴侣，每件都是单独制作的。

title: Paper Washi Pendant
description: A Nordic-Japanese pendant light using traditional Japanese washi paper over a bamboo armature—its warm diffused glow is the embodiment of Nordic hygge and Japanese wabi-sabi combined.

metadata.description_zh: 传统日本和纸覆盖竹骨架的北欧日式吊灯，温暖的漫射光芒是北欧hygge与日式侘寂结合的体现。

title: Seashell Display Tray
description: A shallow bleached wood tray perfect for displaying Nordic coastal collections—seashells, pebbles, driftwood fragments, and candles for a Scandinavian shore tableau.

metadata.description_zh: 浅色漂白木托盘，非常适合展示北欧海岸收藏，贝壳、鹅卵石、漂流木碎片和蜡烛组成斯堪的纳维亚海岸场景。

title: Botanical Print Trio
description: Three coordinated botanical art prints inspired by Nordic wild plants—fern, birch, and moss—printed on 200 gsm fine art paper. Perfect for a Nordic gallery wall grouping.

metadata.description_zh: 三件协调的植物艺术印刷，灵感源于北欧野生植物，蕨类、桦树和苔藓，印刷于200克重艺术纸，非常适合北欧照片墙组合。

title: Monitor Light Bar
description: The Monitor Light Bar clips to the top of any monitor and projects light downward onto the desk without glare or screen reflections—a Nordic ergonomic lighting essential.

metadata.description_zh: 显示器灯条夹于任何显示器顶部，向下投射光线到桌面而不产生眩光或屏幕反射，是北欧人体工学照明必备。

title: Book Ends Set
description: A pair of Nordic marble bookends in natural black or white marble—solid, heavy, and beautiful objects that keep books upright while doubling as desk sculptures.

metadata.description_zh: 一对北欧大理石书挡，天然黑色或白色大理石，坚固厚重且美丽，在保持书籍直立的同时兼作桌面雕塑。

title: Teak Planter Box
description: The Teak Planter Box is a window ledge and balcony railing essential for Nordic herb gardens. FSC teak weathers naturally and the open slat bottom allows perfect drainage.

metadata.description_zh: 柚木花盆盒是北欧香草花园的窗台和阳台栏杆必备，FSC柚木自然老化，开放式板条底部允许完美排水。

title: Copper Fire Pit
description: The Copper Fire Pit develops a rich patina over time, transforming from bright copper to deep green in the Nordic outdoor tradition of embracing natural material change.

metadata.description_zh: 铜火盆随时间发展出丰富的铜绿，从明亮铜色转变为深绿色，体现北欧户外接受天然材料变化的传统。

title: Laundry Basket with Lid
description: A generous woven rattan laundry basket with a hinged lid—the Nordic answer to bathroom and bedroom clutter that hides the laundry while looking beautiful.

metadata.description_zh: 宽大的编织藤编洗衣篮配铰链盖，是浴室和卧室杂乱的北欧答案，在保持美观的同时隐藏洗衣。

title: Bathroom Storage Tower
description: The Bathroom Storage Tower provides four-tier storage in a small bathroom footprint—open shelves and a cabinet below keep towels, toiletries, and supplies neatly organised.

metadata.description_zh: 浴室储物塔在小浴室占地面积中提供四层储物，上方开放搁架和下方柜子整洁整理毛巾、盥洗用品和耗材。

title: Nordic Christmas Ornament Set
description: Twelve hand-painted Nordic folk-pattern ceramic ornaments—reindeer, snowflakes, and Christmas trees in traditional Scandinavian red and white. A festive heirloom collection.

metadata.description_zh: 十二件手绘北欧民俗图案陶瓷装饰，驯鹿、雪花和圣诞树以传统斯堪的纳维亚红白色调，是节日传家收藏。

title: Acorn Candle Holder Set
description: Three small brass acorn-shaped taper candle holders—a whimsical Nordic nature reference that celebrates the forest materials at the heart of Scandinavian design.

metadata.description_zh: 三个小黄铜橡果形柱形烛台，是颂扬斯堪的纳维亚设计核心森林材料的异想北欧自然参考。

title: Glass Globe Vase Large
description: A large hand-blown clear glass globe vase—a Nordic lighting and botanical statement piece that catches natural light beautifully when filled with water and floating flowers.

metadata.description_zh: 大型手吹透明玻璃球花瓶，装满水和漂浮花朵后能美丽捕捉自然光的北欧照明和植物宣言单品。
